BossDefeatReward_KingAlpaca.nameZh: 君王美露帕的讨伐证明

BossDefeatReward_KingAlpaca_Ice.name: Ice Kingpaca Bounty Token
BossDefeatReward_KingAlpaca_Ice.nameZh: 冰帝美露帕的讨伐证明

AcidRain.name: Acid Rain
AcidRain.description:
Creates acidic clouds that
pour down acid rain on enemies.
AcidRain.descriptionZh:
生成酸性云朵
在敌人头上下酸雨。

AirBlade.name: Air Blade
AirBlade.description: Sends out sharp blades of air in a fan shape.

AirCanon.name: Air Cannon
AirCanon.description: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

Apocalypse.name: Apocalypse
Apocalypse.description: Generates several dark vortexes around the enemy.
Apocalypse.descriptionZh: 于敌人周围生成数个暗黑龙卷风。

AquaJet.name: Hydro Jet
AquaJet.description:
Hurls a high speed ball of water
at an enemy.

BeamSlicer.name: Beam Slicer
BeamSlicer.description:
Mows down the area in front with a beam imbued with dragon power.
The area struck by the beam will also explode after a short delay.
BeamSlicer.descriptionZh:
用龙属性的射线一扫前方。
被扫过地方将产生延迟爆炸。

BlastCanon.name: Blast Cannon
BlastCanon.description:
Fires an energy bullet imbued with dragon power at the enemy's location.
Upon impact, the bullet shatters and creates a frontal long-range explosion.
BlastCanon.descriptionZh:
向敌人的位置发射充满龙属性的能量弹。
能量弹在着弹时将向周围扩散，在前方广范围引发爆炸。

BlizzardLance.name: Iceberg
BlizzardLance.description:
Summons a sharp ice lance
under an enemy.
BlizzardLance.descriptionZh:
在敌人的脚边
生成尖锐的冰刃。

BubbleShot.name: Bubble Blast
BubbleShot.description:
Fires numerous bubbles
that slowly pursue an enemy.
BubbleShot.descriptionZh:
发射大量泡沫
并缓慢追击敌人。

BubbleShower.name: Poison Shower
BubbleShower.description: Focuses energy into the body and scatters poison orbs in all directions.
BubbleShower.descriptionZh:
使出浑身力量
向各个方向喷洒毒球。

ChargeCanon.name: Charge Cannon
ChargeCanon.description:
Fires an energy orb infused with draconic power at the enemy. 
The orb causes a wide-area explosion upon impact.
ChargeCanon.descriptionZh:
向敌人发射积蓄着龙属性力量的能量弹。
能量弹在着弹时将引发大范围爆炸。

Commet.name: Comet Strike
Commet.description:
Drops a meteorite straight down,
generating a shock wave around the impact area.
Commet.descriptionZh:
召唤陨石垂直落下，
并在撞击点产生冲击波。

CommetRain.name: Meteorain
CommetRain.description:
Drops countless meteorites,
generating an array of shock waves.
CommetRain.descriptionZh:
召唤无数陨石落下， 
并在撞击点产生冲击波。

CreepingBubble.name: Creeping Bubbles
CreepingBubble.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Generates a multitude of bubbles around the enemy to surround and attack them.
CreepingBubble.descriptionZh:
奥沧鲸的专用技能。
在敌人周围生成大量泡泡，将其团团包围并发动攻击。

CrossWind.name: Crosswind
CrossWind.description: Conjures blades of wind in front of the enemy, converging to deliver a cutting cross attack.
CrossWind.descriptionZh:
在敌人前方生成风刃，
并对其发动十字斩击。

DarkArrow.name: Dark Arrow
DarkArrow.description:
Fires off dark energy
that homes in on an enemy.
DarkArrow.descriptionZh: 使用暗之力连续发射数支高速箭追击敌人。

DarkBall.name: Dark Ball
DarkBall.description:
Unleashes a sphere of darkness 
that slowly tracks down an enemy.
DarkBall.descriptionZh: 发射以缓慢速度追击敌人的黑暗之球。

DarkCanon.name: Dark Cannon
DarkCanon.description:
Hurls an energy ball imbued
with dark energy at an enemy.
DarkCanon.descriptionZh: 将带有黑暗力量的高速能量弹射向敌人。

DarkLaser.name: Dark Laser
DarkLaser.description:
Charges dark energy before
blasting enemies with a powerful beam.
DarkLaser.descriptionZh:
积蓄黑暗之力
瞄准敌人发射强劲光线。

DarkLegion.name: Dark Whisp
DarkLegion.description: Fires a menacing ball of dark energy that pursues enemies.
DarkLegion.descriptionZh: 发射多个可以追击敌人的黑暗之球。

DarkPulse.name: Umbral Surge
DarkPulse.description:
Fires high-speed dark orbs in a fan shape, 
spreading as they travel.
DarkPulse.descriptionZh: 向前方发射呈扇形扩散的高速暗黑球。

DarkWave.name: Shadow Burst
DarkWave.description:
Quickly discharges dark energy,
damaging those around it.
DarkWave.descriptionZh:
快速释放黑暗之力
给周围造成冲击。

DiamondFall.name: Diamond Rain
DiamondFall.description:
Creates numerous lumps of ice that are
consecutively dropped on a foe's head.
DiamondFall.descriptionZh:
在敌人头顶生无数个冰块，
随后接连落下攻击目标。

DiversionLaser.name: Torrential Blast
DiversionLaser.description:
Fires a high-pressure stream of water forward.
After a short delay, the stream branches off to the left and right.
DiversionLaser.descriptionZh:
向前方发射高压水流。
片刻后，水流会向左右分岔。

DoubleIcicleThrow.name: Double Blizzard Spike
DoubleIcicleThrow.description:
Creates two huge ice blocks
and fires them at the enemy one after another.
On impact, it also shocks those close by.
DoubleIcicleThrow.descriptionZh:
做出两个巨大的冰块，
瞄准敌人先后发射。
撞击后对周围造成冲击。

DragonBreath.name: Dragon Breath
DragonBreath.description:
Exhales breath imbued with draconic energy,
dealing continuous damage to those in front of it.
DragonBreath.descriptionZh:
向前方呼出蕴含龙之力的气息
，持续对目标造成伤害。

DragonCanon.name: Dragon Cannon
DragonCanon.description:
Hurls an energy ball imbued
with draconic energy at an enemy.
DragonCanon.descriptionZh:
用蕴藏龙之力的能量弹
瞄准敌人并发射。

DragonMeteor.name: Dragon Meteor
DragonMeteor.description:
Summons numerous small meteorites
and launches them at an enemy.
DragonMeteor.descriptionZh:
召唤大量小陨石
瞄准敌人并发射。

DragonWave.name: Dragon Burst
DragonWave.description:
Quickly discharges draconic energy,
damaging those around it.
DragonWave.descriptionZh:
快速释放龙之力
给周围造成冲击。

ElecWave.name: Shockwave
ElecWave.description:
Quickly discharges electricity,
shocking those around it.
ElecWave.descriptionZh:
快速放电
给周围造成冲击。

Eruption.name: Volcanic Rain
Eruption.description:
Fires countless volcanic bombs into the sky.
After a while, the bombs rain down around their originator.
Eruption.descriptionZh:
向上空喷射无数熔岩弹。
一段时间后，射出的熔岩弹将如雨一般散落在周围。

FireBall.name: Fire Ball
FireBall.description:
Creates a giant ball of flame and hurls it at an enemy.
The ball explodes over a wide area upon impact.
FireBall.descriptionZh:
在头上生成巨大火球，并向敌人发射。
中弹后会爆炸，造成大范围爆炸冲击波。

FireBlast.name: Ignis Blast
FireBlast.description:
Hurls a ball of fire 
straight at an enemy.
FireBlast.descriptionZh:
瞄准后发射可笔直飞向敌人
的火焰弹。

FireSeed.name: Spirit Fire
FireSeed.description:
Shoots fireballs towards an enemy. 
The fireballs explode after a short distance, 
generating smaller fireballs that spread forward.
FireSeed.descriptionZh:
向敌人发射火球。
稍作飞行后会破裂
并向前方放射小型火球。

FlameFunnel.name: Flame Funnel
FlameFunnel.description:
Creates multiple spheres of fiery energy,
from which countless fireballs shoot towards the enemy.
FlameFunnel.descriptionZh:
使用火焰的力量做出复数个球体，
然后向敌人发射无数火球。

FlameWall.name: Flame Wall
FlameWall.description:
Creates a wall of flames at the enemy's location.
The wall of flames will remain for a while,
and deal damage to the enemies it touches.
FlameWall.descriptionZh:
在敌人的位置燃起火焰之墙。
火墙将持续一段时间，
对碰到的敌人造成伤害。

Flamethrower.name: Ignis Breath
Flamethrower.description:
Shoots flames at an enemy,
dealing continuous damage.
Flamethrower.descriptionZh:
面向敌人释放火焰，
持续对目标造成伤害。

FlareArrow.name: Flare Arrow
FlareArrow.description:
Fires three flaming arrows in succession
that home in on an enemy.
FlareArrow.descriptionZh:
连续发射3支高速火箭
并追击敌人。

FlareTornado.name: Flare Storm
FlareTornado.description:
Generates two flaming tornadoes on either side 
before launching them at an enemy.
FlareTornado.descriptionZh:
在左右两侧生成炙热的龙卷风，
并扇向敌人。

FrostBreath.name: Crystal Breath
FrostBreath.description:
Enshrouds an enemy in a frigid blast of air,
dealing continuous damage.
FrostBreath.descriptionZh:
朝敌人喷出冰冷空气，
持续对目标造成伤害。

GhostFlame.name: Spirit Flame
GhostFlame.description:
Fires three balls of malice
that relentlessly pursue an enemy.
GhostFlame.descriptionZh:
发射3个怨念
并执着追击敌人。

GrassGolem_Dark_PartnerSkill.name: Corruption Laser
GrassGolem_Dark_PartnerSkill.nameZh: 暗黑草木魔像伙伴技能

GrassTornado.name: Grass Tornado
GrassTornado.description:
Generates two tornadoes on either side 
before launching them at an enemy.
GrassTornado.descriptionZh:
在左右两侧生成龙卷风，
并扇向敌人。

GravityShot.name: Dark Shot
GravityShot.description:
Fires a dark energy projectile
that accelerates over time.
GravityShot.descriptionZh: 发射逐渐加速的黑暗能量弹

HolyBlast.name: Holy Burst
HolyBlast.description:
Creates a wide explosion of light
at the enemy's location and around it.
HolyBlast.descriptionZh: 在敌人脚下和四周引发大范围的光柱爆炸。

Human_Punch.name: Punch
Human_Punch.description: Punch with conviction; believe in the power of the fist.
Human_Punch.descriptionZh: 相信自己的拳头，出拳攻击。

HydroPump.name: Hydro Laser
HydroPump.description:
Shoots pressurized water at extreme velocities,
sweeping over a wide area in front of it.
HydroPump.descriptionZh:
猛烈地释放出水流
并向前方大范围横扫。

HydroSlicer.name: Hydro Slicer
HydroSlicer.description:
Mows down the frontal area with a blast of compressed water.
The area struck by the blast erupts with water after a short delay.
HydroSlicer.descriptionZh:
用压缩水流一扫前方。
被扫过的区域会在片刻后喷出水柱。

HyperBeam.name: Pal Blast
HyperBeam.description:
Charges destructive energy before firing
a high-powered beam forward across a wide area.
HyperBeam.descriptionZh:
积蓄破坏性的能量，
朝前方大范围射出威力惊人的光束。

IceAge.name: Absolute Frost
IceAge.description: Throws icicles in a wide area from under the enemy's feet.
IceAge.descriptionZh: 大范围的在敌人脚下生成冰柱穿刺。

IceBlade.name: Icicle Cutter
IceBlade.description:
Creates a crescent blade of ice
and hurls it forward.
IceBlade.descriptionZh:
制造出新月型的冰刃，
将之射向前方。

IceMissile.name: Ice Missile
IceMissile.description:
Creates ice lances in the air
that fly towards enemies.
IceMissile.descriptionZh:
在上空生成尖锐的冰柱
瞄准敌人后发射冰柱。

IceWall.name: Freeze Wall
IceWall.description:
Creates a wall of ice that rises from the ground.
The ice wall remains standing for a while,
and breaks after taking enough damage.
IceWall.descriptionZh:
从地面召唤出冰墙。
冰墙会持续一段时间，
并在承受一定伤害后碎裂。

IcicleLine.name: Icicle Line
IcicleLine.description: Generates pillars of ice that move in a straight line in three directions.
IcicleLine.descriptionZh: 召唤朝前方三个方向推进的冰柱

IciclePierce.name: Icicle Bullet
IciclePierce.description:
Generates multiple sharp ice blocks in the sky
and fires them at the enemy.
IciclePierce.descriptionZh:
在空中生成复数个冰锥，
瞄准敌人一齐射出。

IcicleThrow.name: Blizzard Spike
IcicleThrow.description:
Creates a giant lump of ice and hurls it at an enemy.
It deals damage to those in the surrounding area upon impact.
IcicleThrow.descriptionZh:
生成巨大的冰块
瞄准敌人后高速发射。
中弹时，可同时给周围造成冲击。

Inferno.name: Ignis Rage
Inferno.description:
Infuses the surrounding ground with energy, 
causing it to explode after a set amount of time.
Inferno.descriptionZh:
使敌人周围地面活性化，
并在一定时间后爆炸。

LightningStrike.name: Lightning Strike
LightningStrike.description:
Acts as a lightning rod, calling down thunderbolts
that electrocute the surrounding area.
LightningStrike.descriptionZh:
让自己化作避雷针引来雷电，
并在原地引发闪电爆炸。

LineGeyser.name: Splash
LineGeyser.description: Generates a column of water that travels in a straight line.
LineGeyser.descriptionZh: 召唤一束直线前进的水柱。

LineThunder.name: Lightning Streak
LineThunder.description:
Generates a lightning bolt 
that moves forward in a line.
LineThunder.descriptionZh: 生成可笔直前进的雷击。

LockonLaser.name: Lock-on Laser
LockonLaser.description:
Takes aim at an enemy before
firing a super high speed laser.
LockonLaser.descriptionZh:
瞄准敌人后
发射超高速的雷电激光。

MudShot.name: Bog Blast
MudShot.description:
Hurls sticky mud
at an enemy.
MudShot.descriptionZh:
用黏糊糊的泥巴
瞄准敌人并发射。

PoisonFog.name: Poison Fog
PoisonFog.description:
Generates a fog of poison in front, 
causing the opponent to become poisoned.
PoisonFog.descriptionZh:
于前方制造毒雾，
使目标陷入中毒状态。

PoisonShot.name: Poison Blast
PoisonShot.description:
Hurls poison sludge
at an enemy.
PoisonShot.descriptionZh:
用蕴藏剧毒之力的淤泥
瞄准敌人并发射。

PowerBall.name: Power Bomb
PowerBall.description:
Charges a massive amount of energy
before firing a large destructive ball.
PowerBall.descriptionZh:
积蓄大量能量，
并将其化作巨大球体射出。

PowerShot.name: Power Shot
PowerShot.description:
Charges energy
into a focused blast.
PowerShot.descriptionZh:
积蓄能量，
并将其化作子弹射出。

Psychokinesis.name: Psycho Gravity
Psychokinesis.description:
Utilizes gravity to deprive enemies of their freedom, 
then slams them into the ground from high above.
Psychokinesis.descriptionZh:
用重力剥夺敌人的行动自由，
并将其从高处砸向地面。

RadiantBarrage.name: Radiant Barrage
RadiantBarrage.description:
Unleashes a sphere of light that slowly tracks down an enemy. 
As it nears its target, it splits into countless light bullets that strike all at once.
RadiantBarrage.descriptionZh:
发射一个缓慢追踪敌人的光球。
光球在接近目标时会分裂成无数光弹攻击敌人。

RaidCutter.name: Raid Cutter
RaidCutter.description:
Shoots countless wind swords 
that fly straight towards the enemy.
RaidCutter.descriptionZh: 瞄准敌人射出无数风刃。

Railbolt.name: Thunder Rail
Railbolt.description:
Charge the power of lightning to the limit
and fires multiple simultaneous electric shocks at the enemy.
Railbolt.descriptionZh:
积蓄雷电的力量到极限， 
朝敌人同时发射多道强力雷击。

RangeThunder.name: All Range Thunder
RangeThunder.description:
Generates lightning strikes that travel 
in a straight line in all directions.
RangeThunder.descriptionZh: 向八个方向召唤直线推进的雷击。

ReflectiveShuriken.name: Reflect Leaf
ReflectiveShuriken.description:
Launches a blade of wind that rebounds off enemies or trees, striking repeatedly.
Can ricochet up to four times.
ReflectiveShuriken.descriptionZh:
发射风刃，
在击中敌人或树木时反弹并连续造成攻击，
最多可反弹4次。

RipTide.name: Aqua Surge
RipTide.description:
Generates waves that surge around the enemy from all sides. 
They converge and explode at the center, erupting into a column of water.
RipTide.descriptionZh:
在敌人四周掀起波浪并涌向敌人，
最后在中心点爆炸，喷出高高的水柱。

RockBeat.name: Rocky Impact
RockBeat.description: Shakes the ground and lifts a massive boulder into the air.
RockBeat.descriptionZh:
震动地面，
并令巨大的岩石飞起。

RockLance.name: Rock Lance
RockLance.description:
Generates a sharp rock spear
under an enemy.
RockLance.descriptionZh:
在敌人的脚边
生成尖锐的岩石长矛。

RootAttack.name: Spine Vine
RootAttack.description:
Generates spiny thorns that chase an enemy
along the ground, piercing them from below.
RootAttack.descriptionZh:
用地下尖锐的根部追击敌人
并从脚下贯穿敌人。

RootLance.name: Circle Vine
RootLance.description:
Sprouts sharp roots
in and around the enemy's location.
RootLance.descriptionZh: 在敌人的位置和其周围刺出尖锐的根刺。

SandTornado.name: Sand Tornado
SandTornado.description:
Generates two sand tornadoes on either side
before launching them at an enemy.
SandTornado.descriptionZh:
在左右两侧生成砂砾龙卷风，
并扇向敌人。

SandTwister.name: Sand Twister
SandTwister.description:
Creates multiple sand tornadoes.
The tornadoes continuously spin in circles.
SandTwister.descriptionZh:
生成复数个砂龙卷。
龙卷风们将一边自旋一边绕中心旋转。

SeaGush.name: Geyser Gush
SeaGush.description: Erupts massive pillars of water beneath and around the enemy.
SeaGush.descriptionZh:
在敌人所在位置及其周围区域
喷出大量水柱。

SeedMachinegun.name: Seed Machine Gun
SeedMachinegun.description:
Fires a volley of hard seeds
at enemies in front of it.
SeedMachinegun.descriptionZh:
释放大量坚硬的种子
攻击前方的敌人。

SeedMine.name: Seed Mine
SeedMine.description:
Launches a deadly seed.
If it hits an enemy, the seed explodes.
SeedMine.descriptionZh:
发射危险的种子。
碰到敌人会绽开并爆炸。

SelfDestruct.name: Implode
SelfDestruct.description:
Risks its life to cause a violent explosion.
Becomes incapacitated afterwards.
SelfDestruct.descriptionZh:
赌上性命引发爆炸。
使用后会陷入无法战斗的状态。

SelfDestruct_Bee.name: Bee Quiet
SelfDestruct_Bee.description:
Risks its life to cause a violent explosion, 
but receives the honor of falling in battle.
SelfDestruct_Bee.descriptionZh:
赌上性命引发爆炸。
是种为了荣誉而牺牲自己的技能。

SelfExplosion.name: Megaton Implode
SelfExplosion.description:
Risks life to cause a massive explosion.
Those who perish for their duty become glistening stars in the night sky.
SelfExplosion.descriptionZh:
赌上性命引发大爆炸。 
使用后便会化作夜空中闪耀的明星。

ShadowBall.name: Nightmare Ball
ShadowBall.description:
Creates a giant ball of darkness
and hurls it at an enemy.
ShadowBall.descriptionZh:
生成巨大的黑暗之球
瞄准敌人并高速发射。

ShokeiLaser.name: Lethal Laser
ShokeiLaser.description:
After aiming at the enemy,
fires multiple ultra-fast lightning lasers.
ShokeiLaser.descriptionZh: 锁定敌人后，连续射出超高速的雷射。

SolarBeam.name: Solar Blast
SolarBeam.description:
Charges solar energy before
blasting enemies with a powerful beam.
SolarBeam.descriptionZh:
积蓄太阳之力
瞄准敌人发射强劲光线。

SpecialCutter.name: Multicutter
SpecialCutter.description:
The user fires three high-speed blades of wind
in quick succession that fly straight at enemies.
SpecialCutter.descriptionZh:
瞄准敌人发射
3发直线飞行的超高速风刃。

SpreadPulse.name: Spark Blast
SpreadPulse.description:
Releases lightning orbs in a fan shape, 
spreading as they travel.
SpreadPulse.descriptionZh: 向前方发射呈扇形扩散的雷电球。

StarMine.name: Star Mine
StarMine.description:
Generates stars around the enemy that explode on contact.
Stars also explode after some time.
StarMine.descriptionZh:
在敌人周围生成一碰就爆炸的星星。 
星星在经过一定时间后，没有触碰也会爆炸。

StoneShotgun.name: Stone Blast
StoneShotgun.description: Fires a barrage of stones forward.
StoneShotgun.descriptionZh: 向前方射出大量的小石头碎屑。

ThreeCommet.name: Comet Barrage
ThreeCommet.description:
Drops meteorites one after another,
generating shock waves around the impact areas.
ThreeCommet.descriptionZh:
召唤陨石接连落下， 
并在撞击点产生冲击波。

ThreeThunder.name: Tri-Lightning
ThreeThunder.description:
Generates lightning that strikes
an enemy three times from above.
ThreeThunder.descriptionZh: 在敌人头上生成3次落雷。

ThrowRock.name: Stone Cannon
ThrowRock.description:
Digs up a boulder
and hurls it at an enemy.
ThrowRock.descriptionZh:
将岩石从眼前的地上吸附起来
瞄准敌人并发射。

ThunderBall.name: Electric Ball
ThunderBall.description:
Fires an electric ball
that slowly pursues an enemy.
ThunderBall.descriptionZh:
发射雷电球
并缓慢追击敌人。

ThunderFunnel.name: Plasma Funnel
ThunderFunnel.description:
Creates two balls of electric energy
that fire numerous lightning orbs at enemies.
ThunderFunnel.descriptionZh:
生成两个蕴含雷电能量的球
然后瞄准敌人，从中发射无数雷球。

ThunderRain.name: Thunder Rain
ThunderRain.description:
Calls lightning that strikes an enemy
after a set amount of time has passed.
ThunderRain.descriptionZh:
召唤雷电
在一定时间后生成大量落电。

ThunderSpear.name: Thunder Spear
ThunderSpear.description:
Fires a high-speed lightning spear
straight ahead towards the enemy.
ThunderSpear.descriptionZh: 向敌人发射高速直线飞行的雷枪。

ThunderStorm.name: Thunderstorm
ThunderStorm.description:
Generates a huge tornado of lightning
that moves slowly towards the enemy.
ThunderStorm.descriptionZh:
召唤巨大的雷属性龙卷风。
龙卷风将追踪敌人缓慢移动。

Thunderbolt.name: Lightning Bolt
Thunderbolt.description:
Charges electric energy before
blasting enemies with a powerful shock.
Thunderbolt.descriptionZh:
积蓄雷电之力
瞄准敌人释放强劲电击。

Tremor.name: Rockburst
Tremor.description: Causes the ground to shake before hurling a massive stone mass at its surroundings.
Tremor.descriptionZh:
撼动地面， 
使大块岩石射向四面八方

TriSpark.name: TriSpark
TriSpark.description:
A high-speed lightning ball that flies in a straight line.
Simultaneously fires slow lightning balls that track the enemy.
TriSpark.descriptionZh:
同时发射直线飞行的高速雷球，
和追踪敌人的慢速雷球。

Unique_Alpaca_Tackle.name: Fluffy Tackle
Unique_Alpaca_Tackle.description:
Melpaca's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while surrounded by an adorable aura.
Unique_Alpaca_Tackle.descriptionZh:
美露帕的专用技能。
散发出可爱的气场并朝向前方冲刺。

Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Bite.name: Fierce Fang (Fire)
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_AmaterasuWolf_BiteV2.name: Double Fang (Fire)
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_Bite.name: Fierce Fang (Dark)
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_BiteV2.name: Double Fang (Dark)
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_DarkCharge.name: Daring Shadowstorm
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_DarkCharge.description:
Kitsun Noct's exclusive skill.
Charges forward with great speed while enveloped in intense purple flames.
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_Dark_DarkCharge.descriptionZh:
幽焰狼的专用技能。
带着缠绕全身的紫色火焰，气势汹汹地向前猛冲。

Unique_AmaterasuWolf_FireCharge.name: Daring Flames
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_FireCharge.description:
Kitsun's exclusive skill.
Charges forward with great speed while enveloped in intense blue flames.
Unique_AmaterasuWolf_FireCharge.descriptionZh:
苍焰狼的专用技能。
带着缠绕全身的青蓝火焰，气势汹汹地向前猛冲。

Unique_Anubis_GroundPunch.name: Ground Smash
Unique_Anubis_GroundPunch.description:
Anubis' exclusive skill.
Leaps high into the air and strikes a punch to the ground, 
causing a shockwave that deals damge over a wide area.
Unique_Anubis_GroundPunch.descriptionZh:
阿努比斯的专用技能。 
高高跃起后，对地面使出猛力一击。 
产生的衝击波将对大范围的目标造成伤害。

Unique_Anubis_LowRoundKick.name: Spinning Roundhouse
Unique_Anubis_LowRoundKick.description:
Anubis' exclusive skill.
Performs a spin kick with its strong legs, sweeping enemies over a wide area.
Unique_Anubis_LowRoundKick.descriptionZh:
阿努比斯的专用技能。
用强健的腿脚回旋飞踢，大范围横扫周围的敌人。

Unique_Anubis_Tackle.name: Forceful Charge
Unique_Anubis_Tackle.description:
Anubis' exclusive skill.
Rapidly pursues its foes while releasing energy
and unleashing a powerful punch.
Unique_Anubis_Tackle.descriptionZh:
阿努比斯的专用技能。
快速移动追击敌人，
释放能量同时不断挥出强劲利拳。

Unique_Baphomet_Dark_DarkKite.name: Nightmare Claw
Unique_Baphomet_Dark_DarkKite.description:
Incineram Noct's exclusive skill. 
Draws near enemies using its left dark claw to slash them into the air
before cutting them down with its right dark claw.
Unique_Baphomet_Dark_DarkKite.descriptionZh:
暗魔羊的专用技能。
接近目标后跳起同时以左手暗爪向上挥击，
再用右手暗爪迅速向下挥砍。

Unique_Baphomet_SwallowKite.name: Hellfire Claw
Unique_Baphomet_SwallowKite.description:
Incineram's exclusive skill.
Draws near enemies using its left claw to slash them into the air
before cutting them down with its right claw.
Unique_Baphomet_SwallowKite.descriptionZh:
炎魔羊及亚种的专用技能。
接近目标后跳起同时以左手爪子向上挥击，
再用右手爪子迅速向下挥砍。

Unique_BirdDragon_FireBreath.name: Flame Breath
Unique_BirdDragon_FireBreath.description:
Vanwyrms exclusive skill.
Advances while breathing fire from its mouth.
Unique_BirdDragon_FireBreath.descriptionZh:
烽歌龙的专用技能。
一边从口部喷出火焰一边前进。

Unique_BirdDragon_Ice_IceBreath.name: Tempest Blizzard
Unique_BirdDragon_Ice_IceBreath.description:
Vanwyrm Cryst's exclusive skill.
Advances while exhaling cold air from its mouth.
Unique_BirdDragon_Ice_IceBreath.descriptionZh:
霜歌龙的专用技能。
一边从口部呼出冷气一边前进。

Unique_BlackCentaur_TwoSpearRushes.name: Twin Spears
Unique_BlackCentaur_TwoSpearRushes.description:
Necromus' exclusive skill.
Clads its twin spears with vicious whirlwinds and charges forward,
thrusting them one after the other.
Unique_BlackCentaur_TwoSpearRushes.descriptionZh:
混沌骑士的专用技能。 
以旋风包覆双手的长枪后， 
朝前方冲刺并左右交替刺击。

Unique_BlackGriffon_TackleLaser.name: Divine Disaster
Unique_BlackGriffon_TackleLaser.description:
Charges forward, generating orbs of light that automatically target enemies 
and unleash a barrage of lasers.
Unique_BlackGriffon_TackleLaser.descriptionZh:
异构格里芬的专用技能。
在向前猛冲的同时制造出光球。
光球会自动捕捉敌人，并射出大量激光。

Unique_BlackGriffon_TackleLaser2.name: Divine Disaster II
Unique_BlackGriffon_TackleLaser2.description:
Shadowbeak's exclusive skill. 
As it charges forward, emits countless blue rays that automatically locate and pursue the enemy.
Unique_BlackGriffon_TackleLaser2.descriptionZh:
异构格里芬的专用技能。
一边突进，一边从身体的圆环出射出无数的蓝色光束。
光束会自动追踪敌人。

Unique_BlackMetalDragon_FirePunch.name: Firefist Breathstorm
Unique_BlackMetalDragon_FirePunch.description:
Astegon's exclusive skill.
After throwing two punches forward, it exhales a dragon breath downward.
Unique_BlackMetalDragon_FirePunch.descriptionZh:
魔渊龙的专用技能。
在向前方挥出两拳后，
向下呼出龙属性的吐息。

Unique_BlackPuppy_Bite.name: Fierce Fang (Dark)
Unique_BlackPuppy_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_BlackPuppy_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_BlackPuppy_BiteV2.name: Double Fang (Dark)
Unique_BlackPuppy_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_BlackPuppy_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_BlueSkyDragon_DrainStorm.name: Celestial Vortex
Unique_BlueSkyDragon_DrainStorm.description:
Shaolong's exclusive skill.
Summons a massive vortex reaching into the heavens.
The vortex draws in and eliminates all surrounding enemies at once.
Unique_BlueSkyDragon_DrainStorm.descriptionZh:
霄龙的专用技能。
召唤直冲天际的巨大漩涡。
吞噬周围的敌人，将其一网打尽。

Unique_BlueSkyDragon_SweepBreath.name: Azure Dracoflare
Unique_BlueSkyDragon_SweepBreath.description:
Shaolong's exclusive skill.
Breathes Dragon-elemental flames in a sweeping motion, scorching the surrounding area.
Unique_BlueSkyDragon_SweepBreath.descriptionZh:
霄龙的专用技能。
喷吐龙属性烈焰横扫四方，
将周围尽数化为焦土。

Unique_BlueSkyDragon_Tossin.name: Hydra Charge
Unique_BlueSkyDragon_Tossin.description:
Shaolong's exclusive skill.
Cloaks the body in water and charges straight forward.
Unique_BlueSkyDragon_Tossin.descriptionZh:
霄龙的专用技能。
周身缠绕水流，笔直地向前猛冲。

Unique_BlueThunderHorse_FlashDash.name: Bolt Blink
Unique_BlueThunderHorse_FlashDash.description:
Azurmane's exclusive skill.
Moves with the speed of lightning, engulfing everything in its path.
Unique_BlueThunderHorse_FlashDash.descriptionZh:
驭雷马的专用技能。
以闪电般的速度移动，
并将途径的所有存在都卷入。

Unique_BlueThunderHorse_Tossin.name: Flash Charge
Unique_BlueThunderHorse_Tossin.description:
Azurmane's exclusive skill.
Cloaks the body in lightning and performs a high-speed charge toward the enemy.
Unique_BlueThunderHorse_Tossin.descriptionZh:
驭雷马的专用技能。
周身缠绕雷电，朝敌人高速猛冲。

Unique_Boar_Tackle.name: Reckless Charge
Unique_Boar_Tackle.description:
Rushoar's exclusive skill.
Takes aim at a foe and rushes at them with a fierce charge.
Unique_Boar_Tackle.descriptionZh:
草莽猪的专用技能。
瞄准敌人后，猛烈地冲向敌人。

Unique_CaptainPenguin_Black_BodySlide_El.name: Thunderslide
Unique_CaptainPenguin_Black_BodySlide_El.description:
Penking Lux's exclusive skill.
Lies on its belly while generating electric charge all around it
before sliding at enemies at high speed.
Unique_CaptainPenguin_Black_BodySlide_El.descriptionZh:
闪丸王的专用技能。
全身电流涌动，腹部着地滑行
并用力撞向敌人。

Unique_CaptainPenguin_BodySlide.name: Emperor Slide
Unique_CaptainPenguin_BodySlide.description:
Penking's exclusive skill.
Lies on its belly while generating frozen air all around it
before sliding at enemies at high speed.
Unique_CaptainPenguin_BodySlide.descriptionZh:
企丸王的专用技能。
全身散发寒气，并采用腹部着地之姿滑行，
往敌人的方向用力撞去。

Unique_ChickenPal_ChickenPeck.name: Chicken Rush
Unique_ChickenPal_ChickenPeck.description:
Chikipi's exclusive skill. 
Flies at enemies in its sights, attacking them with its sharp beak.
Unique_ChickenPal_ChickenPeck.descriptionZh:
皮皮鸡的专用技能。
瞄准并飞扑向敌人后，用尖喙突袭敌人。

Unique_ClownRabbit_TrickShow.name: Trickster Show
Unique_ClownRabbit_TrickShow.description:
Dupin's exclusive skill.
Creates two illusions to distract enemies, then launches fire birds from its top hat.
Unique_ClownRabbit_TrickShow.descriptionZh:
拉比耶尔的专用技能。
制造2道幻影迷惑敌人，
本体则从丝绸礼帽中放出炎鸟进行攻击。

Unique_CubeTurtle_CubePress.name: Cube Press
Unique_CubeTurtle_CubePress.description:
Tetroise 's exclusive skill.
Leaps into the air and crushes enemies with its massive weight.
Unique_CubeTurtle_CubePress.descriptionZh:
重岩龟的专用技能。
高高跃起至空中，
随即以压倒性的重量将敌人压垮。

Unique_CubeTurtle_Neutral_HolyPress.name: Holy Press
Unique_CubeTurtle_Neutral_HolyPress.description:
Tetroise Primo's exclusive skill.
Leaps into the air and crushes enemies with its massive weight.
Upon landing, light spreads outward, forming pillars of light that burst forth and strike nearby enemies.
Unique_CubeTurtle_Neutral_HolyPress.descriptionZh:
净岩龟的专用技能。
高高跃起至空中，将敌人压垮。
随后扩散光芒，以光柱进行追击。

Unique_CuteMole_DiggingAttack.name: Fuddler Tunneler
Unique_CuteMole_DiggingAttack.description:
Fuddler's exclusive skill.
Burrows underground and bursts out from beneath enemies.
Unique_CuteMole_DiggingAttack.descriptionZh:
遁地鼠的专用技能。
潜入地下，从脚下猛然窜出突袭敌人。

Unique_DarkAlien_JumpScractch.name: Evil Slash
Unique_DarkAlien_JumpScractch.description:
Xenovader's exclusive skill.
Swiftly pounces and slashes with its left hand.
Unique_DarkAlien_JumpScractch.descriptionZh:
杰诺贝达的专用技能。
灵活的跃起，用左手撕裂敌人。

Unique_DarkCrow_TelePoke.name: Phantom Peck
Unique_DarkCrow_TelePoke.description:
Cawgnito's exclusive skill. 
Teleports next to an enemy 
before attacking with its beak.
Unique_DarkCrow_TelePoke.descriptionZh:
黑鸦隐士的专用技能。
瞬间移动至敌人身旁，
再以鸟喙发动攻击。

Unique_DarkMechaDragon_BeamSlash.name: Beam Slash
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_BeamSlash.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Generates a high-output beam sword with the right hand 
and delivers two powerful slashes while moving at high speed.
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_BeamSlash.descriptionZh:
杰诺多兰的专用技能。
在右手生成高功率的光剑，
高速移动同时进行二连斩击。

Unique_DarkMechaDragon_ConvergentBeam.name: Astral Ray
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_ConvergentBeam.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Concentrates energy filled with darkness and releases it all at once in a straight line.
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_ConvergentBeam.descriptionZh:
杰诺多兰的专用技能。
集中充盈暗黑力量的能量，
一口气以直线状放出。

Unique_DarkMechaDragon_FunnelLaser.name: Omega Laser
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_FunnelLaser.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Summons the light of destruction from subspace and continuously fires it in all directions, burning everything in its sight to ashes.
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_FunnelLaser.descriptionZh:
杰诺多兰的专用技能。
从亚空间呼唤毁灭的光束不断进行横向垂直扫射，
将视野范围内的一切燃烧殆尽。

Unique_DarkMechaDragon_SetFunnel.name: Satellite Bit
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_SetFunnel.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Generates four satellite-like wings with auto-attack functionality. 
These wings will automatically track and attack the enemy when the next attack is launched.
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_SetFunnel.descriptionZh:
杰诺多兰的专用技能。
召唤4个有自动攻击能力的卫星型羽毛。
羽毛在进行攻击时会自动追踪敌人。

Unique_DarkMechaDragon_WarpComet.name: Cosmic Meteor
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_WarpComet.description:
Xenolord's exclusive skill.
Soars into the air at the speed of light and releases countless meteor projectiles. 
Afterwards, transforms into a comet and charges forward, causing a massive explosion upon impact.
Unique_DarkMechaDragon_WarpComet.descriptionZh:
杰诺多兰的专用技能。
以光速飞上高空，射出无数的流星弹。
之后将自身化为彗星向地面突进，
在撞击的地点引发大范围的爆炸。

Unique_DarkScorpion_Pierce.name: Jumping Stinger
Unique_DarkScorpion_Pierce.description:
Menasting's exclusive skill.
Jumps high and forcefully stabs its prey with its tail.
The poison from the tail is deadly.
Unique_DarkScorpion_Pierce.descriptionZh:
冥铠蝎及亚种的专用技能。
高高跃起，用尾巴狠狠地将猎物刺穿。
尾部含有毒素。

Unique_Deer_Ground_DirtyHorn.name: Mud Horn
Unique_Deer_Ground_DirtyHorn.description:
Eikthyrdeer Terra's exclusive skill.
Charges at foes and uses its antlers to whip mud at them.
When used while riding, the direction of the charge can be controlled.
Unique_Deer_Ground_DirtyHorn.descriptionZh:
祇岳鹿的专用技能。
面向敌人冲刺，用尖角卷起泥土攻击敌人。
如在骑乘时发动，可操控前进方向。

Unique_Deer_PushupHorn.name: Antler Uppercut
Unique_Deer_PushupHorn.description:
Eikthyrdeer's exclusive skill.
Charges at foes and uses antlers to launch them into the air.
When used while riding, the direction of the charge can be controlled.
Unique_Deer_PushupHorn.descriptionZh:
紫霞鹿及亚种的专用技能。
面向敌人冲刺，扬起尖角攻击敌人。
如在骑乘时发动，可操控前进方向。

Unique_DomeArmorDragon_ExplosiveMissile.name: Missile Burst
Unique_DomeArmorDragon_ExplosiveMissile.description:
Aegidron's exclusive skill.
Launches countless explosive missiles from its wings.
Unique_DomeArmorDragon_ExplosiveMissile.descriptionZh:
磐甲龙的专用技能。
从羽翼射出无数爆裂导弹，对敌人进行轰炸。

Unique_DrillGame_ShellAttack.name: Shell Spin
Unique_DrillGame_ShellAttack.description:
Digtoise's exclusive skill.
Moves while spinning its whole body at high speed.
Drills through enemies, dealing continuous damage.
Unique_DrillGame_ShellAttack.descriptionZh:
碎岩龟的专用技能。
以全身高速旋转的方式移动，
并以钻头刨削敌人，持续对目标造成伤害。

Unique_Eagle_GlidingNail.name: Gale Claw
Unique_Eagle_GlidingNail.description:
Galeclaw's exclusive skill.
With talons outstretched, 
it glides forward in a ferocious charge.
Unique_Eagle_GlidingNail.descriptionZh:
天擒鸟的专用技能。
向前伸出脚爪，
以滑翔的姿态猛力冲向目标。

Unique_ElecPanda_ElecScratch.name: Lightning Claw
Unique_ElecPanda_ElecScratch.description:
Grizzbolt's exclusive skill.
After leaping at an enemy and tearing at it twice with its electrically charged claws, it attacks the ground, sending an electric shock throughout the area.
Unique_ElecPanda_ElecScratch.descriptionZh:
暴电熊的专用技能。
飞扑向敌人，并用带电流的爪子将其劈开。
飞扑2次后，面向地面伸出爪子，
大范围扩散电流。

Unique_ElecPanda_GatlingAttack.name: Heavy Thunder Tank
Unique_ElecPanda_GatlingAttack.description:
Grizzbolt's exclusive skill.
Pulls out a minigun out of nowhere and starts blasting. 
Finishes with a single, charged power shot.
Unique_ElecPanda_GatlingAttack.descriptionZh:
暴电熊的专用技能。
不知从哪取出加特林机枪进行扫射。
最后一发将射出强力的充能弹。

Unique_ElecPomeranian_Bite.name: Fierce Fang (Electric)
Unique_ElecPomeranian_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_ElecPomeranian_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_ElecPomeranian_BiteV2.name: Double Fang (Electric)
Unique_ElecPomeranian_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_ElecPomeranian_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_ElecSnail_ShellCharge.name: Shell Charge
Unique_ElecSnail_ShellCharge.description:
Snock's exclusive skill.
Withdraws into its shell to reduce damage taken while building electric charge.
Once fully charged, it discharges, damaging nearby enemies.
After discharging, the Attack of this Pal's Electric skills is increased for a limited time.
Unique_ElecSnail_ShellCharge.descriptionZh:
电涡蜗及亚种的专用技能。
缩入壳中减伤并积蓄电能。
充满后释放电流，对周围敌人造成伤害。
放电后，短时间内自身雷属性技能攻击力提升。

Unique_FairyDragon_FairyTornado.name: Mystic Whirlwind
Unique_FairyDragon_FairyTornado.description:
Elphidran's exclusive skill.
Generates twin whirlwinds imbued with a mysterious power
that pursues enemies.
Unique_FairyDragon_FairyTornado.descriptionZh:
精灵龙及亚种的专用技能。
发射2股蕴含不可思议能力的龙卷风，
追击敌人。

Unique_FeatherOstrich_Tossin.name: Earth Dash
Unique_FeatherOstrich_Tossin.description:
Dazemu's exclusive skill.
Accelerates all at once 
and dashes forward at high speed.
Unique_FeatherOstrich_Tossin.descriptionZh:
战冠雀的专用技能。
一口气提高速度，向前方突进。

Unique_FengyunDeeper_CloudTempest.name: Cloud Tempest
Unique_FengyunDeeper_CloudTempest.description:
Fenglope's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while manipulating the atmosphere
to create a pressurized wind tunnel around itself.
Unique_FengyunDeeper_CloudTempest.descriptionZh:
云海鹿的专用技能。
操控大气，借助风压向前猛冲。

Unique_FengyunDeeper_Electric_ThunderTem.name: Thunder Tempest
Unique_FengyunDeeper_Electric_ThunderTem.description:
Charges forward while manipulating the atmosphere 
and enveloping itself in thunderclouds.
Unique_FengyunDeeper_Electric_ThunderTem.descriptionZh:
雷隐鹿的专用技能。
操控大气，身缠雷云向前猛冲。

Unique_FireKirin_Dark_DarkTossin.name: Dark Charge
Unique_FireKirin_Dark_DarkTossin.description:
Pyrin Noct's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while engulfed in a veil of dark flames.
Flames continue to burn in its path.
Unique_FireKirin_Dark_DarkTossin.descriptionZh:
邪麒麟的专用技能。 
带着缠绕全身的暗黑火焰向前猛冲。 
途经之处均会留下滚滚火焰。

Unique_FireKirin_Tackle.name: Ignis Charge
Unique_FireKirin_Tackle.description:
Pyrin's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while engulfed in a veil of flames.
Flames continue to burn in its path.
Unique_FireKirin_Tackle.descriptionZh:
火麒麟的专用技能。
带着缠绕全身的火焰向前猛冲。
途经之处均会留下滚滚火焰。

Unique_FlameBuffalo_FlameHorn.name: Blazing Horn
Unique_FlameBuffalo_FlameHorn.description:
Arsox's exclusive skill.
Takes aim and charges with fierce momentum while raising its horn.
Unique_FlameBuffalo_FlameHorn.descriptionZh:
炽焰牛的专用技能。
锁定敌人后，
以凶猛气势顶着锐利牛角冲向对方。

Unique_FlowerDinosaur_Electric_ThunderWh.name: Lightning Smash
Unique_FlowerDinosaur_Electric_ThunderWh.description:
Dinossom Lux's exclusive skill. 
Uses its large tail to strike the ground in front of it,
delivering a bolt of lightning in a straight line.
Unique_FlowerDinosaur_Electric_ThunderWh.descriptionZh:
雷冠龙的专用技能。
使用巨大的尾巴拍打前方地面，
对直线范围造成雷击。

Unique_FlowerDinosaur_Whip.name: Botanical Smash
Unique_FlowerDinosaur_Whip.description:
Dinossom's exclusive skill.
Uses its large tail to strike the ground in front of it, 
delivering a shockwave in a straight line.
Unique_FlowerDinosaur_Whip.descriptionZh:
花冠龙及亚种的专用技能。
使用巨大的尾巴拍打前方地面，
对直线范围造成冲击。

Unique_FlowerPrince_PoisonGasDance.name: Toxic Dance
Unique_FlowerPrince_PoisonGasDance.description:
Dandilord's exclusive skill.
Performs a dance while releasing corrosive mist.
The mist remains in the area for a limited time.
Unique_FlowerPrince_PoisonGasDance.descriptionZh:
夜蔓爵的专用技能。
舞动的同时喷射腐蚀雾。
雾气会在原地残留一段时间。

Unique_FlowerPrince_PoisonGasTackle.name: Poison Promenade
Unique_FlowerPrince_PoisonGasTackle.description:
Dandilord's exclusive skill.
Charges forward while sliding along the ground, spraying corrosive mist.
The mist remains in the area for a limited time.
Unique_FlowerPrince_PoisonGasTackle.descriptionZh:
夜蔓爵的专用技能。
喷吐腐蚀雾的同时贴地滑行突进。
雾气会在原地残留一段时间。

Unique_Garm_Bite.name: Fierce Fang
Unique_Garm_Bite.description: Swiftly leaps at an enemy and bites into them.
Unique_Garm_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_Garm_BiteV2.name: Double Fang
Unique_Garm_BiteV2.description: Launches a rapid succession of bites at the enemy.
Unique_Garm_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_GhostAnglerfish_Fire_SweepBait_Fi.name: Scorching Lantern Sweep
Unique_GhostAnglerfish_Fire_SweepBait_Fi.description:
Ghangler Ignis's exclusive skill. 
Lashes forward with the flaming lantern atop its head, sweeping broadly ahead.
Unique_GhostAnglerfish_Fire_SweepBait_Fi.descriptionZh:
炙灯鱼的专用技能。
使用头部附着火焰的提灯横扫前方大范围目标。

Unique_GhostAnglerfish_SweepBait.name: Lantern Sweep
Unique_GhostAnglerfish_SweepBait.description:
Ghangler's exclusive skill. 
Lashes forward with the lantern atop its head, sweeping broadly ahead.
Unique_GhostAnglerfish_SweepBait.descriptionZh:
冥灯鱼的专用技能。
使用头部长长的提灯横扫前方大范围目标。

Unique_GhostBeast_Tossin.name: Spirit Dash
Unique_GhostBeast_Tossin.description:
Maraith's exclusive skill.
While running slowly, it continuously launches flickering fireballs toward the enemy.
Unique_GhostBeast_Tossin.descriptionZh:
噬魂兽的专用技能。
缓慢奔跑的同时，不断召唤摇曳的火球飞向敌人。

Unique_GhostDragon_PhosphorousBeam.name: Blazing Beam
Unique_GhostDragon_PhosphorousBeam.description:
Eidrolon's exclusive skill.
Emits a superheated light beam for a short time.
At the final moment, the targeted area is engulfed in a massive explosion.
Unique_GhostDragon_PhosphorousBeam.descriptionZh:
灵曦龙及亚种的专用技能。
持续喷吐高温光线。
最终在光线落点引发剧烈爆炸。

Unique_GhostDragon_TailSlash.name: Tail Slash
Unique_GhostDragon_TailSlash.description:
Eidrolon's exclusive skill.
Closes in on the enemy at high speed to deliver a cleaving swipe with its tail.
Unique_GhostDragon_TailSlash.descriptionZh:
灵曦龙的专用技能。
高速逼近敌人，以尾巴进行斩击。

Unique_GoldenHorse_Bite.name: Fierce Fang (Ground)
Unique_GoldenHorse_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_GoldenHorse_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_GoldenHorse_BiteV2.name: Double Fang (Ground)
Unique_GoldenHorse_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_GoldenHorse_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_GoldenHorse_StoneDash.name: Crash Dash
Unique_GoldenHorse_StoneDash.description:
Gildane's exclusive skill.
Charges forward, hurling rocks to the left and right with great force.
Unique_GoldenHorse_StoneDash.descriptionZh:
金驰兽的专用技能。
在气势汹汹突进的同时，令碎岩向左右飞溅。

Unique_Gorilla_GroundPunch.name: Ground Pound
Unique_Gorilla_GroundPunch.description:
Gorirat's exclusive skill.
Pounds the ground twice before leaping into the air
and delivers a powerful punch.
Unique_Gorilla_GroundPunch.descriptionZh:
铁拳猿及亚种的专用技能。
猛击地面两次后高高跳起，
再赏给对方强力的一拳。

Unique_Gorilla_Ground_EarthPunch.name: Rumble Combo
Unique_Gorilla_Ground_EarthPunch.description:
Gorirat Terra's exclusive skill. 
Pounds the ground twice before leaping into the air
and delivers a powerful punch infused with the Power of Gaia.
Unique_Gorilla_Ground_EarthPunch.descriptionZh:
石掌猿的专用技能。
猛击地面两次后高高跳起，
再赏给对方汇聚大地之力的一拳。

Unique_GrassGolem_ArmCannon.name: Root Cannon
Unique_GrassGolem_ArmCannon.description:
Dualiths exclusive skill.
Fires a Grass-elemental energy projectile from its arm.
Upon impact, the blast transforms into persistent roots that track and pierce the enemy from below.
Unique_GrassGolem_ArmCannon.descriptionZh:
双心岩傀的专用技能。
从手臂发射草属性能量弹。
能量弹落地后会化为根须，紧追敌人，并从其脚下破土贯穿。

Unique_GrassGolem_Dark_DarkArmCannon.name: Dark Root
Unique_GrassGolem_Dark_DarkArmCannon.description:
Dualith Nocts exclusive skill.
Fires a Dark-elemental energy projectile from its arm.
Upon impact, the blast transforms into persistent roots that track and pierce the enemy from below.
Unique_GrassGolem_Dark_DarkArmCannon.descriptionZh:
咒心岩傀的专用技能。
从手臂发射暗属性能量弹。
能量弹落地后会化为根须，紧追敌人，并从其脚下破土贯穿。

Unique_GrassGolem_RocketPunch.name: Rocket Arm
Unique_GrassGolem_RocketPunch.description:
Dualiths exclusive skill.
Detaches its left arm to sweep enemies, then launches its right arm.
Unique_GrassGolem_RocketPunch.descriptionZh:
双心岩傀及亚种的专用技能。
将左臂从本体分离，横扫敌人。
随后再射出右臂。

Unique_GrassMinotaur_BullRush.name: Raging Bull Rush
Unique_GrassMinotaur_BullRush.description:
Elgrove's exclusive skill.
Enters a violent frenzy and unleashes four consecutive rage-fueled Grass-element charge attacks.
Unique_GrassMinotaur_BullRush.descriptionZh:
密林陶洛斯的专用技能。
狂暴地激发力量，
连续发动4次草属性突进。

Unique_GrassMinotaur_BullRush_Lower.name: Bull Rush
Unique_GrassMinotaur_BullRush_Lower.description:
Elgrove's exclusive skill.
Enters a wild frenzy and unleashes two consecutive Grass-element charge attacks.
Unique_GrassMinotaur_BullRush_Lower.descriptionZh:
密林陶洛斯的专用技能。
狂暴地激发力量，
连续发动2次草属性突进。

Unique_GrassMinotaur_Ice_BullRush.name: Raging Snow Rush
Unique_GrassMinotaur_Ice_BullRush.description:
Elgrove Cryst's exclusive skill.
Enters a violent frenzy and unleashes four consecutive rage-fueled Ice-element charge attacks.
Unique_GrassMinotaur_Ice_BullRush.descriptionZh:
冰峰陶洛斯的专用技能。
狂暴地激发力量，
连续发动4次冰属性突进。

Unique_GrassMinotaur_Ice_BullRush_Lower.name: Snow Rush
Unique_GrassMinotaur_Ice_BullRush_Lower.description:
Elgrove Cryst's exclusive skill.
Enters a wild frenzy and unleashes two consecutive Ice-element charge attacks.
Unique_GrassMinotaur_Ice_BullRush_Lower.descriptionZh:
冰峰陶洛斯的专用技能。
狂暴地激发力量，
连续发动2次冰属性突进。

Unique_GrassPanda_Electric_ElectricPunch.name: Blast Punch
Unique_GrassPanda_Electric_ElectricPunch.description:
Mossanda Lux's exclusive skill.
Winds up its right arm before delivering an electrically charged punch.
Unique_GrassPanda_Electric_ElectricPunch.descriptionZh:
雷胖达的专用技能。
不停转动右臂，向前方挥出带电拳击。

Unique_GrassPanda_MusclePunch.name: Crushing Punch
Unique_GrassPanda_MusclePunch.description:
Mossanda's exclusive skill.
Winds up its right arm before striking an enemy with a devastating punch.
Unique_GrassPanda_MusclePunch.descriptionZh:
叶胖达的专用技能。
不停转动右臂，向前方猛力出拳攻击。

Unique_GrassRabbitMan_GrassRoundKick.name: Leaping Roundhouse
Unique_GrassRabbitMan_GrassRoundKick.description:
Verdash's exclusive skill.
While jumping forward, it sweeps the surroundings with a high-speed spinning kick.
Unique_GrassRabbitMan_GrassRoundKick.descriptionZh:
踏春兔的专用技能。
向前方跳起的同时高速回旋踢击，
将周围一扫而净。

Unique_Grassmammoth_Earthquake.name: Earth Impact
Unique_Grassmammoth_Earthquake.description:
Mammorest's exclusive skill. 
Uses its massive body to shake the earth, 
dealing damage over a wide area.
Unique_Grassmammoth_Earthquake.descriptionZh:
森猛犸及亚种的专用技能。
以巨大的身躯撼动大地，
对四周大范围的目标造成伤害。

Unique_GrimGirl_BrutalMachete.name: Grudge Barrage
Unique_GrimGirl_BrutalMachete.description:
Splatterina's exclusive skill.
Teleports instantly and launches a slash. It then teleports above the enemy, 
drives its weapon into them, and unleashes a wave of dark energy.
Unique_GrimGirl_BrutalMachete.descriptionZh:
幽恋娜的专用技能。
从原先位置瞬间移动的同时打出斩击。
然后瞬移至目标头顶，
用利刃刺穿猎物并产生暗属性能量波。

Unique_GuardianDog_Bite.name: Fierce Fang
Unique_GuardianDog_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_GuardianDog_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_GuardianDog_BiteV2.name: Double Fang
Unique_GuardianDog_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_GuardianDog_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_HawkBird_Storm.name: Tornado Attack
Unique_HawkBird_Storm.description:
Nitewing's exclusive skill.
Generates a tornado ahead before soaring towards its target.
Unique_HawkBird_Storm.descriptionZh:
疾风隼的专用技能。
在前方制造出龙卷风后，
以滑翔的姿态冲向敌人。

Unique_HerculesBeetle_BeetleTackle.name: Giga Horn
Unique_HerculesBeetle_BeetleTackle.description:
Warsect's exclusive skill.
Skewers enemies with its four sturdy horns.
Unique_HerculesBeetle_BeetleTackle.descriptionZh:
铠格力斯及亚种的专用技能。
以四支粗壮的角串起敌人。

Unique_Horus_FlareBird.name: Phoenix Flare
Unique_Horus_FlareBird.description:
Faleris' exclusive skill.
After creating scorching tornadoes, it cloaks itself in hellfire and charges forward.
Unique_Horus_FlareBird.descriptionZh:
荷鲁斯的专用技能。 
扇起炙热龙卷风后， 
身体被狱火包围，一边滑翔一边突袭敌人。

Unique_Horus_PerfectStorm.name: Raging Flame Wave
Unique_Horus_PerfectStorm.description:
Faleris' exclusive skill.
Generates multiple scorching tornadoes and charges forward while gliding.
The tornadoes converge in the center and eventually merge into a single massive tornado.
Unique_Horus_PerfectStorm.descriptionZh:
荷鲁斯的专用技能。
卷起数个灼热的龙卷风，
同时身缠烈焰，飞空向敌人突进。
龙卷风最终将融合为巨大火龙卷。

Unique_Horus_Water_AquaStorm.name: Phoenix Tide
Unique_Horus_Water_AquaStorm.description:
Faleris Aqua's exclusive skill.
After summoning a massive tornado, it envelops its body in water and charges forward.
Unique_Horus_Water_AquaStorm.descriptionZh:
伊西斯的专用技能。
扇起漩涡龙卷风后，
化身为波涛，一边滑翔一边突袭敌人。

Unique_IceCrocodile_SpitAttack.name: Chaotic Spray
Unique_IceCrocodile_SpitAttack.description:
Munchill's exclusive skill.
Coughs up three cold grenades kept undigested inside its body and lobs them at enemies.
May occasionally spit out something more dangerous...?
Unique_IceCrocodile_SpitAttack.descriptionZh:
肚肚鳄的专用技能。
连续喷吐3颗体内尚未消化
但已经冷却的手榴弹进行攻击。
有时还会喷出更危险的东西……？

Unique_IceDeer_IceHorn.name: Freezing Charge
Unique_IceDeer_IceHorn.description:
Reindrix's exclusive skill.
Charges at an enemy with antlers adorned in ice.
Unique_IceDeer_IceHorn.descriptionZh:
严冬鹿的专用技能。
向前冲刺并以雄伟的冰角刺穿敌人。

Unique_IceHorse_Dark_DarkBladeAttack.name: Dark Wing
Unique_IceHorse_Dark_DarkBladeAttack.description:
Frostallion Noct's exclusive skill. 
Dashes forward while concentrating dark energy around its wings,
using them to slash enemies,
then converting that energy into homing shots
Unique_IceHorse_Dark_DarkBladeAttack.descriptionZh:
唤夜兽的专用技能。
用暗能量包裹翅膀后，全力奔跑以双翼撕裂敌人。
且暗能量最后会化为追踪弹攻击敌人。

Unique_IceHorse_IceBladeAttack.name: Crystal Wing
Unique_IceHorse_IceBladeAttack.description:
Frostallion's exclusive skill.
Dashes forward while concentrating frigid air around its wings,
using them to slash enemies with icy blade.
Unique_IceHorse_IceBladeAttack.descriptionZh:
唤冬兽及亚种的专用技能。
凝结冷空气，让翅膀覆上冰晶，
并在全力奔跑的同时以冰翼撕裂敌人。

Unique_IceNarwhal_JumpingHorn.name: High Breach
Unique_IceNarwhal_JumpingHorn.description:
Whalaska's exclusive skill.
Charges straight ahead and briefly submerges, then bursts high into the air to launch an attack.
An ice-element explosion occurs upon emerging.
Unique_IceNarwhal_JumpingHorn.descriptionZh:
凉晶鲸及亚种的专用技能。
笔直突进后短暂潜伏，
接着高高跃起进行攻击。
跃起时会引发冰属性爆炸。

Unique_JetDragon_JumpBeam.name: Beam Comet
Unique_JetDragon_JumpBeam.description:
Jetragon's exclusive skill.
Illuminates its wings and fires innumerable beams as it flies towards the enemy.
The beams explode on impact.
Unique_JetDragon_JumpBeam.descriptionZh:
空涡龙的专用技能。
展开发光的翅膀，
并发射大量光束朝敌人飞去。
光束命中目标便会引发爆炸。

Unique_KingAlpaca_BodyPress.name: Kingly Slam
Unique_KingAlpaca_BodyPress.description:
Kingpaca's exclusive skill.
Leaps high into the air before
smashing into an enemy with its chubby, massive body.
Unique_KingAlpaca_BodyPress.descriptionZh:
君王美露帕及亚种的专用技能。
向上高高跳起后，
用丰满的庞大身躯辗压敌人。

Unique_KingAlpaca_Ice_IcePress.name: Frozen Press
Unique_KingAlpaca_Ice_IcePress.description:
Kingpaca Cryst's exclusive skill. 
Leaps high into the air before smashing into
an enemy with ice and its chubby, massive body.
Unique_KingAlpaca_Ice_IcePress.descriptionZh:
冰帝美露帕的专用技能。
向上高高跳起后，
用自身庞大的身躯及冰晶辗压敌人。

Unique_KingBahamut_AirCrash.name: Magna Crush
Unique_KingBahamut_AirCrash.description:
Blazamut Ryu's exclusive skill.
After a big jump, moves at high speed in the air,
gathering strength to unleash a powerful punch.
Unique_KingBahamut_AirCrash.descriptionZh:
殁殃的专用技能。
高高跃上空中后，边在空中高速移动，边积蓄力量。
然后打出全力一击。

Unique_KingBahamut_ArmSmash.name: Brawn Impact
Unique_KingBahamut_ArmSmash.description:
Blazamut's exclusive skill.
Raises and inflates its arms, then slams them together, 
causing a massive explosion in the surrounding area.
Unique_KingBahamut_ArmSmash.descriptionZh:
焰煌及亚种的专用技能。
伸展开手臂，使肌肉剧烈膨胀后，
猛地拍击在一起引发巨大爆炸。

Unique_KingWhale_AquaBlade.name: Aqua Blade
Unique_KingWhale_AquaBlade.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Launches sharp water blades at enemies.
Unique_KingWhale_AquaBlade.descriptionZh:
奥沧鲸的专用技能。
释放锋利的水刃，对敌人进行攻击。

Unique_KingWhale_AquaTornado.name: Aqua Tornado
Unique_KingWhale_AquaTornado.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Soars into the sky and generates multiple massive tornadoes that slowly track enemies.
Unique_KingWhale_AquaTornado.descriptionZh:
奥沧鲸的专用技能。
腾空而起，召唤多个巨型龙卷风。
龙卷风会缓慢追踪敌人。

Unique_KingWhale_Breaching.name: Grand Breach
Unique_KingWhale_Breaching.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Dives underwater and leaps out after a short delay.
The momentum of the leap creates ripples that damage the surrounding area.
Unique_KingWhale_Breaching.descriptionZh:
奥沧鲸的专用技能。
潜入水中，片刻后破水而出。
借鲸跃之势，在周围掀起扩散的波纹。

Unique_KingWhale_HomingBubble.name: Bubble Rain
Unique_KingWhale_HomingBubble.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Fires a large cluster of homing bubbles that remain in place upon landing.
Bubbles burst and deal damage upon contact or after several seconds.
Unique_KingWhale_HomingBubble.descriptionZh:
奥沧鲸的专用技能。
发射大量追踪泡泡。
泡泡着地后会停留在原地。
触碰或数秒后爆裂，对周围造成伤害。

Unique_KingWhale_Maelstrom.name: Maelstrom
Unique_KingWhale_Maelstrom.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Creates a vortex around the enemy. 
The vortex pulls targets toward its center while shrinking, ending in a high-pressure water pillar explosion.
Unique_KingWhale_Maelstrom.descriptionZh:
奥沧鲸的专用技能。
在敌人周围生成漩涡。
将敌人卷入并不断向中心收缩，
最终爆裂，掀起水柱。

Unique_KingWhale_WaveTackle.name: Tidal Charge
Unique_KingWhale_WaveTackle.description:
Panthalus's exclusive skill.
Slams the body into the enemy, generating a massive wave on impact.
Unique_KingWhale_WaveTackle.descriptionZh:
奥沧鲸的专用技能。
利用全身猛然撞击敌人，掀起波浪。

Unique_Kirin_Ice_IceTackle.name: Ice Gale Strike
Unique_Kirin_Ice_IceTackle.description:
Univolt Cryst's exclusive skill.
Generates ice pillars around itself while charging toward enemies.
Unique_Kirin_Ice_IceTackle.descriptionZh:
凌角马的专用技能。
在自己的周围凝聚冰柱，
同时猛力冲向敌人。

Unique_Kirin_LightningTackle.name: Lightning Gale
Unique_Kirin_LightningTackle.description:
Univolt's exclusive skill.
Generates bolts of lightning all around
while charging at its target.
Unique_Kirin_LightningTackle.descriptionZh:
雷角马的专用技能。
在自己的周围降下落雷，
同时猛力冲向敌人。

Unique_LanternButler_LanternFlame.name: Lantern Flame
Unique_LanternButler_LanternFlame.description:
Loomen's exclusive skill.
Raises a lantern and summons multiple spirits that relentlessly pursue enemies.
Unique_LanternButler_LanternFlame.descriptionZh:
妖焰灯的专用技能。
高举提灯，召唤出多个执念深重的怨灵，
紧追敌人不放。

Unique_LeafMomonga_SomerSault.name: Konoha Flip
Unique_LeafMomonga_SomerSault.description:
Herbil's exclusive skill.
After a brief moment of preparation,
charges at the enemy at high speed, finishing with a flip.
Unique_LeafMomonga_SomerSault.descriptionZh:
达鼠泥的专用技能。
短暂蓄力后高速撞击敌人，
同时做出后空翻动作。

Unique_LegendDeer_RadiantPurge_Otomo.name: Purifying Light
Unique_LegendDeer_RadiantPurge_Otomo.description:
Hartalis' exclusive skill.
Leaps high into the air, condensing immense energy into a descending sphere of light.
When it strikes the ground, it purifies all on the ground below.
Unique_LegendDeer_RadiantPurge_Otomo.descriptionZh:
默世鹿的专用技能。
跃向空中，凝聚巨大的能量然后投向地面。
煌煌天光，涤净尘世。

Unique_LegendDeer_RadiantWingRush.name: Divine Wing
Unique_LegendDeer_RadiantWingRush.description:
Hartalis' exclusive skill. 
Leaps back and sprouts wings of light,
then dives toward the enemy.
Unique_LegendDeer_RadiantWingRush.descriptionZh:
默世鹿的专用技能。
向后方跳跃并在背后展开光翼，
从空中向敌人发起突击。

Unique_LegendDeer_WarpPillarBurst.name: Sacred Rain
Unique_LegendDeer_WarpPillarBurst.description:
Hartalis' exclusive skill. 
Fades from sight, then calls down a massive barrage of light pillars centered on its position.
Unique_LegendDeer_WarpPillarBurst.descriptionZh:
默世鹿的专用技能。
一瞬间隐去身姿，然后以自身为中心在大范围召唤大量光柱落下。

Unique_LilyQueen_LilyHealing.name: Bountiful Protection
Unique_LilyQueen_LilyHealing.description:
Lyleen's exclusive skill.
Restores health to all allies within range using the power of healing.
Unique_LilyQueen_LilyHealing.descriptionZh:
百合女王的专用技能。
使用治愈的力量恢复范围内同伴的HP。

Unique_LilyQueen_WindBarrier.name: Wind Barrier
Unique_LilyQueen_WindBarrier.description:
A skill exclusive to the Lilikin species.
Surround yourself with a wind barrier,
Returns the blade of wind to the attacking opponent.
Unique_LilyQueen_WindBarrier.descriptionZh:
▼独特的技能▼
- 请设置技能解释 -

Unique_LotusDragon_LotusBloom.name: Lotus Bloom
Unique_LotusDragon_LotusBloom.description:
Ophydia's exclusive skill.
Burrows into the ground and vanishes.
It then emerges at the surface as a flower bud, blooms, and unleashes a wide-area attack.
Unique_LotusDragon_LotusBloom.descriptionZh:
沁莲龙的专用技能。
潜入地下隐匿身形。
随后化作花苞现身地表，绽放时对大范围敌人发动攻击。

Unique_Manticore_InfernoStrike.name: Volcanic Fang
Unique_Manticore_InfernoStrike.description:
Blazehowl's exclusive skill.
With momentum, it pounces mercilessly on the enemy 
and causes an explosion of fire at the point of impact.
Unique_Manticore_InfernoStrike.descriptionZh:
狱焰王及亚种的专用技能。
毫不留情的气势汹汹扑向敌人，
在扑击的地点引发火属性的爆炸。

Unique_MonochromeQueen_BalletJump.name: Black Quilled Ballet
Unique_MonochromeQueen_BalletJump.description:
Solenne's exclusive skill.
Jumps diagonally and throws sharp black feathers at enemies.
Unique_MonochromeQueen_BalletJump.descriptionZh:
墨罗娜的专用技能。
向斜前方跃起，投掷黑色锋利的羽刃进行攻击。

Unique_MoonQueen_IceMoonBlade.name: Seigetsu Flash
Unique_MoonQueen_IceMoonBlade.description:
Selyne's exclusive skill.
Fires three consecutive high-speed slashes 
imbued with the power of moonlight.
Unique_MoonQueen_IceMoonBlade.descriptionZh:
辉月伊的专用技能。 
挥出蕴含月光力量的高速三连斩击。

Unique_MoonQueen_MoonBeam.name: Moonlight Beam
Unique_MoonQueen_MoonBeam.description:
Selyne's exclusive skill.
Stores energy in the moon on its back,
then fires a crescent-shaped beam forward.
Unique_MoonQueen_MoonBeam.descriptionZh:
辉月伊的专用技能。
将能量积蓄于背后的月亮，
然后向前方发出新月形的射线。

Unique_MoonQueen_MoonBlade.name: Seigetsu Blade
Unique_MoonQueen_MoonBlade.description:
Selyne's exclusive skill.
Fires two consecutive high-speed blades
imbued with the power of moonlight.
Unique_MoonQueen_MoonBlade.descriptionZh:
辉月伊的专用技能。 
挥出蕴含月光力量的高速二连斩击。

Unique_Mothman_GiantSpore.name: Giant Spore
Unique_Mothman_GiantSpore.description:
Silvance's exclusive skill.
Fires a massive tracking spore that pursues enemies. 
It explodes on impact, releasing a wide-area blast.
Unique_Mothman_GiantSpore.descriptionZh:
暮尘蛾的专用技能。
发射追踪敌人的巨大孢子。
命中后爆炸，造成大范围爆炸冲击波。

Unique_Mothman_SporeScatter.name: Spore Burst
Unique_Mothman_SporeScatter.description:
Silvance's exclusive skill.
Scatters explosive spores over a wide area, 
then triggers a mass explosion after a set period of time.
Unique_Mothman_SporeScatter.descriptionZh:
暮尘蛾的专用技能。
大范围散布爆炸孢子，
并在一定时间后同时引爆。

Unique_MummyPal_MummyAttack.name: Mummy Rush
Unique_MummyPal_MummyAttack.description:
Gildra's exclusive skill.
Extends bandages from its hands to deliver a series of attacks.
Unique_MummyPal_MummyAttack.descriptionZh:
缚乃伊的专用技能。
从手中伸长绷带，对敌人进行连续攻击。

Unique_MysteryMask_LifeSteal.name: Soul Drain
Unique_MysteryMask_LifeSteal.description:
Omasculs exclusive skill.
Suddenly appears near the enemy, firmly restraining them with its arms, 
and absorbs the HP of the restrained enemy.
Unique_MysteryMask_LifeSteal.descriptionZh:
面惧的专用技能。
突然出现在敌人附近并用双手将其束缚，
并吸收受到束缚敌人的HP。

Unique_NaughtyCat_CatPress.name: Cat Press
Unique_NaughtyCat_CatPress.description:
Grintale's exclusive skill.
Grins menacingly before leaping into the air
and smashing foes with its body.
Unique_NaughtyCat_CatPress.descriptionZh:
笑魇猫的专用技能。
带着无所畏惧的笑容跳起，
再用全身的力量辗压敌人。

Unique_NightBlueHorse_DeathStep.name: Lethal Step
Unique_NightBlueHorse_DeathStep.description:
Starryon's exclusive skill.
Confuses enemies with flickering steps and launches slashing attack with its sharp horn.
Unique_NightBlueHorse_DeathStep.descriptionZh:
夜冥驹的专用技能。
用鬼魅般的步伐玩弄敌人，
同时用锐利的角挥出斩击。

Unique_NightBlueHorse_Neutral_AirStep.name: Royal Step
Unique_NightBlueHorse_Neutral_AirStep.description:
Starryon Primo's exclusive skill.
Confuses enemies with an elegant stride and launches slashing attack with its sharp horn.
Unique_NightBlueHorse_Neutral_AirStep.descriptionZh:
日耀驹的专用技能。
以华丽步伐戏耍敌人，
同时用锐利的角挥出斩击。

Unique_NightBlueHorse_Neutral_Tossin.name: Silver Steed
Unique_NightBlueHorse_Neutral_Tossin.description:
Starryon Primo's exclusive skill.
Cloaks the body in radiant flames and charges toward the enemy.
Unique_NightBlueHorse_Neutral_Tossin.descriptionZh:
日耀驹的专用技能。
周身缠绕炽烈火焰，朝敌人冲锋。

Unique_NightBlueHorse_Tossin.name: Spectral Steed
Unique_NightBlueHorse_Tossin.description:
Starryon's exclusive skill.
Cloaks the body in flickering flames and charges toward the enemy.
Unique_NightBlueHorse_Tossin.descriptionZh:
夜冥驹的专用技能。
周身缠绕跃动的火焰，朝敌人冲锋。

Unique_NightLady_FlameNightmare.name: Flame Waltz
Unique_NightLady_FlameNightmare.description:
Bellanoir Libero's exclusive skill.
With a graceful dance, conjuries expanding rings of fire, 
then unleashes eerie flames that seek the enemies.
Unique_NightLady_FlameNightmare.descriptionZh:
贝菈露洁的专用技能。
在摇曳起舞的同时製造一圈圈火焰，
使之向周围扩散，
并发射妖异的火球来追击敌人。

Unique_NightLady_WarpBeam.name: Nightmare Bloom
Unique_NightLady_WarpBeam.description:
Bellanoir Libero's exclusive skill.
Disappears suddenly, then reappears while firing a barrage of beams.
The beams spread like a beautiful flower in bloom.
Unique_NightLady_WarpBeam.descriptionZh:
贝菈露洁的专用技能。
趁敌人不注意时隐去身影，并在现身的瞬间射出无数光线，
且光线会犹如绽放的花朵般扩散。

Unique_NightLady_WarpBeam_Straight.name: Nightmare Ray
Unique_NightLady_WarpBeam_Straight.description:
Bellanoir's exclusive skill.
Disappears suddenly, then reappears while firing a barrage of beams.
Unique_NightLady_WarpBeam_Straight.descriptionZh:
贝菈诺娃的专用技能。
趁敌人不注意时隐去身影，并在再次现身的瞬间射出无数光线。

Unique_OctopursGirl_InkJet.name: Smoke Jet
Unique_OctopursGirl_InkJet.descriptionZh:
墨沫姬及亚种的专用技能。
向前方释放烟雾遮蔽自身，
从隐蔽状态中突然发动头槌，猛击敌人。

Unique_PandaGirl_RapidKick.name: Rapid Kick
Unique_PandaGirl_RapidKick.description:
Leafan's exclusive skill.
Rapidly delivers a series of consecutive roundhouse kicks, finishing with an engery blast.
Unique_PandaGirl_RapidKick.descriptionZh:
莉芳的专用技能。
迅速连续施展回旋踢后，释放气功波进行攻击。

Unique_PinkCat_CatPunch.name: Punch Flurry
Unique_PinkCat_CatPunch.description:
Cattiva's exclusive skill.
Chases after enemies, swinging both arms 
and delivering a flurry of punches.
Unique_PinkCat_CatPunch.descriptionZh:
捣蛋猫的专用技能。
挥舞双臂追击敌人，
连续挥出利拳。

Unique_Plesiosaur_LongBreath.name: Deep Breath
Unique_Plesiosaur_LongBreath.description:
Braloha's exclusive skill.
From the base of its long neck to the tip of its snout,
it gradually spreads the breath of grass element.
Unique_Plesiosaur_LongBreath.descriptionZh:
梁叶龙的专用技能。
从修长的颈部缓缓释放出草属性的气息，
逐渐向四周扩散。

Unique_PoseidonOrca_TorrentLaser.name: Thalassonic Laser
Unique_PoseidonOrca_TorrentLaser.description:
Neptilius's exclusive skill.
Rising slightly, it gathers water at its mouth,
then sweeps a high-pressure stream vertically and horizontally three times.
Fissures form at the swept locations, erupting with water.
Unique_PoseidonOrca_TorrentLaser.descriptionZh:
海皇鲸的专用技能。
身体略微上浮并在口中凝聚水流。
随后纵横挥扫出三股高压水流。
被扫过的区域会出现裂缝并喷出水柱。

Unique_PurpleSpider_SpiderRaid.name: Webstrike Impact
Unique_PurpleSpider_SpiderRaid.description:
Tarantriss's exclusive skill.
Spits out a ball of thread, entangling the target it hits. 
Then, rushes at full speed to the trapped target and delivers three slashing strikes to finish it off.
Unique_PurpleSpider_SpiderRaid.descriptionZh:
桃蛛娘的专用技能。
吐出丝线缠绕住猎物。
之后全速冲向猎物所在位置，
打出三段攻击以使其毙命。

Unique_QueenBee_SpinLance.name: Spinning Staff
Unique_QueenBee_SpinLance.description:
Elizabee's exclusive skill.
Channels power into its staff, and unleashes it in a whirl.
Unique_QueenBee_SpinLance.descriptionZh:
女皇蜂的专用技能。
以法杖聚集力量后，再旋转法杖来释放能量。

Unique_RedArmorBird_TriplePeck.name: Rush Beak
Unique_RedArmorBird_TriplePeck.description:
Ragnahawk's exclusive skill.
While flapping forward, it strikes with its beak to ignite fires in front, right, and left, causing a small explosion.
Unique_RedArmorBird_TriplePeck.descriptionZh:
燧火鸟的专用技能。
飞向前方的同时，朝正前、右、左啄击，
并通过点火引发小规模的爆炸。

Unique_RedFlowerBird_JumpKick.name: Flower Stomp
Unique_RedFlowerBird_JumpKick.description:
Tropicaw's exclusive skill. 
Leaps lightly into the air, then forcefully slams its sharp claws into the ground.
Unique_RedFlowerBird_JumpKick.descriptionZh:
大红呱的专用技能。
先轻柔地浮空，再以利爪重重砸向地面。

Unique_RobinHood_BowSnipe.name: Focus Shot
Unique_RobinHood_BowSnipe.description:
Robinquill's exclusive skill.
Takes aim while drawing its bow
before releasing a powerful shot at an enemy.
Unique_RobinHood_BowSnipe.descriptionZh:
羽箭射手及亚种的专用技能。
拉满弓弦全神贯注瞄准敌人后，
对敌人进行射击。

Unique_RockBeast_Ice_IceHorn.name: Ice Burst
Unique_RockBeast_Ice_IceHorn.description:
Pierdon Cryst's exclusive skill.
Rakes the ground with its horn, then hurls a snow chunk at enemies.
Unique_RockBeast_Ice_IceHorn.descriptionZh:
寒峰兽的专用技能。
以角刨开地面并顺势上挑，
朝敌人飞射雪块。

Unique_RockBeast_RockHorn.name: Horn Burst
Unique_RockBeast_RockHorn.description:
Pierdon's exclusive skill.
Rakes the ground with its horn, then hurls a rock projectile at enemies.
Unique_RockBeast_RockHorn.descriptionZh:
磐峰兽的专用技能。
以角刨开地面并顺势上挑，
朝敌人飞射岩石弹。

Unique_Ronin_Iai.name: Iaigiri
Unique_Ronin_Iai.description:
Bushi's exclusive skill.
Taking hold of the sword, it appears in front of an enemy 
in an instant and unleashes an ultra-fast sword draw attack.
Unique_Ronin_Iai.descriptionZh:
浪刃武士及亚种的专用技能。
摆出迎战姿势后瞬间移动至敌人面前，
并使出超高速的拔刀攻击。

Unique_Ronin_Iai_PartnerSkill.name: Iaigiri
Unique_Ronin_Iai_PartnerSkill.description:
Bushi's exclusive skill.
Taking hold of the sword, it appears in front of an enemy 
in an instant and unleashes an ultra-fast sword draw attack.
Unique_Ronin_Iai_PartnerSkill.descriptionZh:
浪刃武士及亚种的专用技能。
摆出迎战姿势后瞬间移动至敌人面前，
并使出超高速的拔刀攻击。

Unique_SaintCentaur_OneSpearRushes.name: Spear Thrust
Unique_SaintCentaur_OneSpearRushes.description:
Paladius' exclusive skill.
Charges forward while enveloped in holy power with its spear thrust ahead.
The shield in its other hand blocks all attacks during the charge.
Unique_SaintCentaur_OneSpearRushes.descriptionZh:
圣光骑士的专用技能。
让神圣的力量覆满自身，
并以左手持长枪向前冲锋。
右手的盾牌在冲锋时能挡下所有攻击。

Unique_SakuraSaurus_SideTackle.name: Muscle Slam
Unique_SakuraSaurus_SideTackle.description:
Broncherry's exclusive skill.
Turns sideways before tackling enemies in front of it,
sending them flying into the air.
Unique_SakuraSaurus_SideTackle.descriptionZh:
连理龙及亚种的专用技能。
侧身站立，
然后向前猛撞敌人，并将其击飞。

Unique_SakuraSaurus_Water_SplashTackle.name: Splash Tackle
Unique_SakuraSaurus_Water_SplashTackle.description:
Broncherry Aqua's exclusive skill. 
Turns sideways before tackling enemies in front of it,
sending them flying with a burst of water.
Unique_SakuraSaurus_Water_SplashTackle.descriptionZh:
海誓龙的专用技能。
侧身站立，然后向前猛撞敌人，
溅起水花并将其击飞。

Unique_SamuraiDog_Bite.name: Fierce Fang (Ground)
Unique_SamuraiDog_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_SamuraiDog_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_SamuraiDog_BiteV2.name: Double Fang (Ground)
Unique_SamuraiDog_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_SamuraiDog_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_SamuraiDog_DashSlash.name: Persistent Slash
Unique_SamuraiDog_DashSlash.description:
Pupperai's exclusive skill.
Charges at full speed, delivering two consecutive slashes with the wooden stick held in its mouth.
Unique_SamuraiDog_DashSlash.descriptionZh:
宗铭丸的专用技能。
全速奔跑的同时，用口中衔着的木棒斩击敌人。
连续施展2段攻击。

Unique_ScorpionMan_Erectric_UpperThunder.name: Thunder Uppercut
Unique_ScorpionMan_Erectric_UpperThunder.description:
's exclusive skill.
Uses superconductivity to closes the distance to the enemy at high speed,
then swings its pincers upward with full force.
Unique_ScorpionMan_Erectric_UpperThunder.descriptionZh:
电针妖的专用技能。
通过超导快速缩短和敌人的距离，
狠狠的用钳子使出上勾拳。

Unique_ScorpionMan_Uppercut.name: Upper Smash
Unique_ScorpionMan_Uppercut.descriptionZh:
蛊刺妖的专用技能。
快速缩短和敌人的距离，
狠狠的用钳子使出上勾拳。

Unique_Sekhmet_RollingScratch.name: Rolling Scratch
Unique_Sekhmet_RollingScratch.description:
Sekhmets exclusive skill.
Spins forward to quickly close the distance and scratch the enemy.
Unique_Sekhmet_RollingScratch.descriptionZh:
塞赫麦特的专用技能。
旋转突进，一口气拉近距离并抓挠敌人。

Unique_Sekhmet_SomersaultScratch.name: Somersault Scratch
Unique_Sekhmet_SomersaultScratch.description:
Sekhmets exclusive skill.
Scratches the enemy while performing a backward somersault to create distance.
Unique_Sekhmet_SomersaultScratch.descriptionZh:
塞赫麦特的专用技能。
抓挠敌人的同时向后翻跃，与敌人拉开距离。

Unique_SheepBall_Roll.name: Roly Poly
Unique_SheepBall_Roll.description:
Lamball's exclusive skill. 
Curls into a ball, rolling after any enemies in its way. 
Becomes dizzy and unable to move after the attack ends.
Unique_SheepBall_Roll.descriptionZh:
棉悠悠的专用技能。
咕噜咕噜地滚动并追击敌人。
攻击后会因晕眩而无法动弹。

Unique_SifuDog_Counter.name: Wholehearted Stance
Unique_SifuDog_Counter.description:
Dogen's exclusive skill.
Adopts an aiki stance. While in this stance, nulify any incoming attack,
instantly close in on the enemy, and counter with a full-forced palm strike.
Unique_SifuDog_Counter.descriptionZh:
汪宗师的专用技能。
摆出合气道的架势，在架势中受到的攻击将无效化，
同时一瞬间迫近敌人，使出全身力量掌击。

Unique_SnakeGirl_SnakeShot.name: Poison Scatter
Unique_SnakeGirl_SnakeShot.description:
Venusa's exclusive skill. 
The snakes on her head spit toxic globs in a wide arc.
The poisonous pool left at the impact point inflicts Poison on anyone who touches it.
Unique_SnakeGirl_SnakeShot.descriptionZh:
梅杜娜的专用技能。
头部的蛇会吐出呈抛物线飞行的毒液球。
毒液球落地便会化为沼泽，令接触沼泽者陷入中毒状态。

Unique_SnowTigerBeastman_SnowImpact.name: Glacial Impact
Unique_SnowTigerBeastman_SnowImpact.description:
Bastigor's exclusive skill.
Let out a mighty roar and leap into the air. Then, embed both arms into the ground to create a massive ice crack. 
Continue to channel power into the ground, ultimately causing a large explosion of ice energy
Unique_SnowTigerBeastman_SnowImpact.descriptionZh:
霜牙王的专用技能。
大声咆哮的同时高高跳起，
落地后将双臂埋入地面，产生巨大的龟裂冰川。
之后不断向地面积蓄力量，最终引发巨大的冰属性爆炸。

Unique_SnowTigerBeastman_TrampleSlash.name: Frost Talon
Unique_SnowTigerBeastman_TrampleSlash.description:
Bastigor's exclusive skill.
Stomps the ground, creating a fissure of ice ahead. 
Then, rapidly closes the distance and slashes with the right hand.
Unique_SnowTigerBeastman_TrampleSlash.descriptionZh:
霜牙王的专用技能。
踩踏地面，在前方产生断裂的冰川。
之后一口气接近敌人，用右手将其撕裂。

Unique_SoldierBee_NeedleLance.name: Needle Spear
Unique_SoldierBee_NeedleLance.description:
Beegarde's exclusive skill.
Charges at the enemy at high speed, delivering a final thrust with a spear.
Unique_SoldierBee_NeedleLance.descriptionZh:
骑士蜂的专用技能。
朝向敌人高速突刺。
最后使出致命一击贯穿敌人。

Unique_StuffedShark_HiddenWeapon.name: Trigger Happy
Unique_StuffedShark_HiddenWeapon.description:
Finsider's exclusive skill.
Draws twin water blasters from its mouth, firing six shots alternately left and right,
then finishes by combining both blasters to unleash one powerful shot.
Unique_StuffedShark_HiddenWeapon.descriptionZh:
布偶鲨及亚种的专用技能。
从口中取出两把水枪，
左右轮流射出6发水弹。
最后双枪合并，射出一发强力水弹。

Unique_SumoDog_SumoStomp.name: Sumo Stomp
Unique_SumoDog_SumoStomp.description:
Bulldosu's exclusive skill.
Raises its right hind leg high and stomps the ground, creating a shockwave that strikes enemies in a fan-shaped area ahead.
Unique_SumoDog_SumoStomp.descriptionZh:
力士獒的专用技能。
高高抡起右后腿重踏地面，释放冲击波，
对前方扇形范围造成攻击。

Unique_TentacleTurtle_HydroSpin.name: Hydro Spin
Unique_TentacleTurtle_HydroSpin.description:
Turtacle's exclusive skill.
Uses jet-powered propulsion to spin rapidly and launch itself at the enemy.
Unique_TentacleTurtle_HydroSpin.descriptionZh:
盔盔仔及亚种的专用技能。
利用水流喷射推进力，
一边高速旋转一边向敌人飞旋而去。

Unique_ThunderBird_Ice_SnowStrom.name: Glacial Plunge
Unique_ThunderBird_Ice_SnowStrom.description:
Beakon Cryst's exclusive skill
Ice first erupts from the ground at the target's location.
Then glides forward in a rushing charge, causing ice to burst from the ground on both sides along its path.
Unique_ThunderBird_Ice_SnowStrom.descriptionZh:
疾霜鸟的专用技能。
先从敌人脚下突起冰柱。
然后在空中突进的同时，于左右两侧接连升起冰柱。

Unique_ThunderBird_ThunderStorm.name: Lightning Dive
Unique_ThunderBird_ThunderStorm.description:
Beakon's exclusive skill.
First, it strikes the enemy's location with lightning. 
Then, while gliding forward, it drops lightning to the left and right.
Unique_ThunderBird_ThunderStorm.descriptionZh:
迅雷鸟的专用技能。
先在敌人所在位置降下落雷。
然后在空中突进的同时，于左右两侧召唤落雷。

Unique_ThunderDog_Bite.name: Fierce Fang (Electric)
Unique_ThunderDog_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_ThunderDog_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_ThunderDog_BiteV2.name: Double Fang (Electric)
Unique_ThunderDog_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_ThunderDog_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_Bite.name: Fierce Fang (Ice)
Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_Bite.description: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.
Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_Bite.descriptionZh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。

Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_BiteV2.name: Double Fang (Ice)
Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_BiteV2.description: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.
Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_BiteV2.descriptionZh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_KoriShorai.name: Frostcall
Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_KoriShorai.description:
Rayhound Cryst's exclusive skill.
Generates ice pillars ahead and charges forward at high speed through the gaps between them.
Unique_ThunderDog_Ice_KoriShorai.descriptionZh:
凛光犬的专用技能。
在前方连续不断生成冰柱，
并在冰柱之间高速突进。

Unique_ThunderDog_InazumaShorai.name: Beckon Lightning
Unique_ThunderDog_InazumaShorai.description:
Rayhound's exclusive skill.
Summons lightning one after another in front, 
then charges forward at high speed through the gaps between the falling bolts.
Unique_ThunderDog_InazumaShorai.descriptionZh:
霹雳犬的专用技能。
在前方呼唤连续不断的雷击，
在落下的雷电间高速突进。

Unique_ThunderDragonMan_NumerousSwordAtt.name: Polykeraunos
Unique_ThunderDragonMan_NumerousSwordAtt.description:
Orserk's exclusive skill.
Summons numerous thunder spears and hurls them at the enemy.
The first spear is imbued with the power of lightning and explodes after a few seconds.
Unique_ThunderDragonMan_NumerousSwordAtt.descriptionZh:
波鲁杰克斯的专用技能。
召唤数把雷枪，向敌人投掷而出，并引发爆炸。

Unique_ThunderDragonMan_ThunderSwordAtta.name: Kerauno
Unique_ThunderDragonMan_ThunderSwordAtta.description:
Orserk's exclusive skill.
Summons a spear of lightning while leaping into the air
before throwing it at an enemy.
Unique_ThunderDragonMan_ThunderSwordAtta.descriptionZh:
波鲁杰克斯的专用技能。
向上跳起后召唤雷枪，
将之丢向敌人。

Unique_TropicalOstrich_DashKick.name: Dash Kick
Unique_TropicalOstrich_DashKick.description:
Palumba's exclusive skill. 
Dashes to build up speed, then launches a devastating airborne kick at its target.
Unique_TropicalOstrich_DashKick.descriptionZh:
咕咕桑葩的专用技能。
冲刺助跑后向敌人发动猛烈踢击。

Unique_Umihebi_Fire_FireWindingTackle.name: Magma Serpent
Unique_Umihebi_Fire_FireWindingTackle.description:
Jormuntide Ignis's exclusive skill.
Letting out a roar, it charges toward the enemy, 
twisting its fire-covered body as it advances.
Unique_Umihebi_Fire_FireWindingTackle.descriptionZh:
腾炎龙的专用技能。
起身咆哮，使用身缠炽炎的巨大身躯蛇形向敌人突进。

Unique_Umihebi_WindingTackle.name: Slither Slam
Unique_Umihebi_WindingTackle.description:
Jormuntide's exclusive skill.
Letting out a roar, it charges toward the enemy, 
twisting its water-covered body as it advances.
Unique_Umihebi_WindingTackle.descriptionZh:
覆海龙的专用技能。
起身咆哮，使用身缠浪涛的巨大身躯蛇形向敌人突进。

Unique_VolcanicMonster_Ice_IceAttack.name: Frost Burst
Unique_VolcanicMonster_Ice_IceAttack.description:
Reptyro Cryst's exclusive skill.
Raises its front legs and slams them into the ground,
causing a frozen blast under its enemies.
It simultaneously bombards them with snow balls from above.
Unique_VolcanicMonster_Ice_IceAttack.descriptionZh:
寒霜兽的专用技能。 
举起前脚猛击地面， 
使冰雪于敌人所在处喷发。 
喷发时四周更会有雪球倾泻而下。

Unique_VolcanicMonster_MagmaAttack.name: Volcanic Burst
Unique_VolcanicMonster_MagmaAttack.description:
Reptyro's exclusive skill.
Raises its front legs and slams them into the ground,
causing a volcanic eruptions under its enemies.
It simultaneously bombards them with volcanic bombs from above.
Unique_VolcanicMonster_MagmaAttack.descriptionZh:
熔岩兽的专用技能。
举起前脚猛击地面，
使岩浆于敌人所在处喷发。
喷发时四周更会有火山弹倾泻而下。

Unique_VolcanoDragon_Ice_IceLaser.name: Ice Laser
Unique_VolcanoDragon_Ice_IceLaser.description:
Moldron Cryst's exclusive skill.
Fires a freezing beam from the mouth that coats the ground in ice.
Frozen ground forms frost pools that freeze and damage enemies on contact.
Unique_VolcanoDragon_Ice_IceLaser.descriptionZh:
川霜龙的专用技能。
从口中喷吐冻结光线，使大地结冰。
冻结的地面会形成霜层，
冻结碰到的敌人并对其造成伤害。

Unique_VolcanoDragon_Ice_IcicleSpit.name: Ice Spit
Unique_VolcanoDragon_Ice_IcicleSpit.description:
Moldron Cryst's exclusive skill.
Spits a chunk of ice from its mouth.
The impact creates frost pools that freeze and damage enemies on contact.
Unique_VolcanoDragon_Ice_IcicleSpit.descriptionZh:
川霜龙的专用技能。
从口中吐出冰块进行攻击。
落地后会使地面冻结，并形成霜层，
冻结碰到的敌人并对其造成伤害。

Unique_VolcanoDragon_MagmaSpit.name: Magma Spit
Unique_VolcanoDragon_MagmaSpit.description:
Moldron's exclusive skill.
Spits a mass of magma from its mouth.
The impact creates magma pools that damage enemies on contact.
Unique_VolcanoDragon_MagmaSpit.descriptionZh:
流焰龙的专用技能。
从口中吐出岩浆团进行攻击。
在落点形成岩浆池，
对碰到的敌人造成伤害。

Unique_VolcanoDragon_VolcanicLaser.name: Magma Laser
Unique_VolcanoDragon_VolcanicLaser.description:
Moldron's exclusive skill.
Emits a thermal beam from its mouth that scorches the ground.
Heated ground forms magma pools that damage enemies on contact.
Unique_VolcanoDragon_VolcanicLaser.descriptionZh:
流焰龙的专用技能。
从口中喷涌而出炽热光束，焚烧大地。
灼热的地面会形成岩浆池，
对碰到的敌人造成伤害。

Unique_WeaselDragon_FlyingTackle.name: Rocket Slam
Unique_WeaselDragon_FlyingTackle.description:
Chillet's exclusive skill.
Gathers a bit of strength and leaps forward.
Always shuts its eyes tight in fear when landing.
Unique_WeaselDragon_FlyingTackle.descriptionZh:
疾旋鼬及亚种的专用技能。
短时间蓄力后，向前跃起。
在着地时因为害怕一直都是紧闭着眼睛。

Unique_Werewolf_Ice_SnowScratch.name: Snow Claw
Unique_Werewolf_Ice_SnowScratch.description:
's exclusive skill.
Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws
imbued with ice element.
Unique_Werewolf_Ice_SnowScratch.descriptionZh:
霜镰魔的专用技能。
向前一跃，迅速斩下两击。
且每次斩击都充满了冰属性的力量。

Unique_Werewolf_Scratch.name: Jumping Claw
Unique_Werewolf_Scratch.description:
's exclusive skill.
Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws
imbued with dark energy.
Unique_Werewolf_Scratch.descriptionZh:
月镰魔的专用技能。
向前一跃，迅速斩下两击。
且每次斩击都充满了暗属性的力量。

Unique_WhiteDeer_Dark_DarkPillar.name: Dark Nova
Unique_WhiteDeer_Dark_DarkPillar.description:
Celesdir Noct's exclusive skill.
After igniting a burst of darkness across a vast area ahead, it strides forward, generating pillars of darkness around itself.
Unique_WhiteDeer_Dark_DarkPillar.descriptionZh:
织夜鹿的专用技能。
在前方引发大范围的暗属性爆炸，
随后边缓慢前行，边在自身周围降下暗之柱。

Unique_WhiteDeer_HolyPillar.name: Holy Nova
Unique_WhiteDeer_HolyPillar.description:
Celesdir's exclusive skill.
After igniting a burst of holy light across a vast area ahead, 
it strides forward, radiating holy light around itself.
Unique_WhiteDeer_HolyPillar.descriptionZh:
净世鹿的专用技能。
在前方引发大范围的圣光爆炸后，
边缓慢行走边在自身周围降下神圣之光。

Unique_WhiteShieldDragon_ShieldTackle.name: Aegis Charge
Unique_WhiteShieldDragon_ShieldTackle.description:
Silvegis's exclusive skill.
Deploys a shield in front that reduces all types of attacks, then charges forward, crushing the enemy.
Unique_WhiteShieldDragon_ShieldTackle.descriptionZh:
艾基鲁迦的专用技能。
在前方展开能够减轻各种伤害的能量盾的同时，
将突进道路上的敌人碾碎。

Unique_WhiteTiger_Ground_IronScratch.name: Stone Claw
Unique_WhiteTiger_Ground_IronScratch.description:
Cryolinx Terra's exclusive skill.
First, it strikes with its claws, followed by a second slash, and culminates with a powerful slash using its entire body.
When swinging the claws, rocks are launched forward in a fan shape.
Unique_WhiteTiger_Ground_IronScratch.descriptionZh:
金棘兽的专用技能。
在两次挥击后，使出浑身力气大幅挥动巨爪。
每次挥动巨爪时，都会向前方扇形区域飞出碎岩。

Unique_WhiteTiger_IceScratch.name: Blizzard Claw
Unique_WhiteTiger_IceScratch.description:
Cryolinx's exclusive skill.
First, it strikes with its claws, followed by a second slash, and culminates with a powerful slash using its entire body.
When swinging the claws, ice pillars are launched forward in a fan shape.
Unique_WhiteTiger_IceScratch.descriptionZh:
冰棘兽的专用技能。
在两次挥击后，使出浑身力气大幅挥动巨爪。
每次挥动巨爪时，都会向前方扇形区域飞出冰柱。

Unique_WingGolem_Fire_FlameCutter.name: Flame Cutter
Unique_WingGolem_Fire_FlameCutter.description:
Knocklem Ignis's exclusive skill.
Takes a big swing and throws the flaming ring from its back.
The ring flies in a circular trajectory.
Unique_WingGolem_Fire_FlameCutter.descriptionZh:
丹烽的专用技能。
大幅回旋身体投掷出背后的炎盘。
炎盘将会以圆弧轨道状飞行。

Unique_WingGolem_RoundCutter.name: Ground Cutter
Unique_WingGolem_RoundCutter.description:
Knocklem's exclusive skill.
Takes a big swing and throws the ring from its back.
The ring flies in a circular trajectory.
Unique_WingGolem_RoundCutter.descriptionZh:
泰锋的专用技能。
大幅回旋身体投掷出背后的岩盘。
岩盘将会以圆弧轨道状飞行。

Unique_YakushimaBoss001_Small_DemonEyeCh.name: Ocular Rush
Unique_YakushimaBoss001_Small_DemonEyeCh.description:
Demon Eye's exclusive skill. 
Charges at the enemy, bouncing off the ground or walls on impact.
Unique_YakushimaBoss001_Small_DemonEyeCh.descriptionZh:
恶魔眼的专用技能。
朝敌人发起冲锋。撞到地面或墙壁时会反弹。

Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Da.name: Slime Press (Dark)
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Da.description:
Purple Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Da.descriptionZh:
紫史莱姆的专用技能。
跳向敌人发动攻击。

Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Fi.name: Slime Press (Fire)
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Fi.description:
Red Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Fi.descriptionZh:
红史莱姆的专用技能。
跳向敌人发动攻击。

Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Le.name: Slime Press (Grass)
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Le.description:
Green Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Le.descriptionZh:
绿史莱姆的专用技能。
跳向敌人发动攻击。

Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_No.name: Slime Press (Neutral)
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_No.description:
Illuminant Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_No.descriptionZh:
夜明史莱姆的专用技能。
跳向敌人发动攻击。

Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Ra.name: Slime Press (Rainbow)
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Ra.description:
Rainbow Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Ra.descriptionZh:
彩虹史莱姆的专用技能。
跳向敌人发动攻击。

Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Wa.name: Slime Press (Water)
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Wa.description:
Blue Slime's exclusive skill. 
Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.
Unique_YakushimaMonster001_SlimePress_Wa.descriptionZh:
蓝史莱姆的专用技能。
跳向敌人发动攻击。

Unique_YakushimaMonster002_SwordCharge.name: Sword Charge
Unique_YakushimaMonster002_SwordCharge.description:
Enchanted Sword's exclusive skill. 
Lunges forward to deliver a sharp thrust.
Unique_YakushimaMonster002_SwordCharge.descriptionZh:
附魔剑的专用技能。
朝敌人发动突刺攻击。

Unique_YakushimaMonster003_BatCharge.name: Winged Assault
Unique_YakushimaMonster003_BatCharge.description:
Cave Bat's exclusive skill. 
Using its whole body, it lunges at the enemy, bouncing off the ground or walls on impact.
Unique_YakushimaMonster003_BatCharge.descriptionZh:
洞穴蝙蝠的专用技能。
利用全身扑向敌人发起进攻。撞到地面或墙壁时会反弹。

Unique_Yakushima_EyeTossin.name: Lock-On Lunge
Unique_Yakushima_EyeTossin.description:
Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill. 
Repeatedly charges at the enemy.
Unique_Yakushima_EyeTossin.descriptionZh:
克苏鲁之眼的专用技能。
多次朝敌人发起冲锋。

Unique_Yakushima_MouthTossin.name: Frenzied Charge
Unique_Yakushima_MouthTossin.description:
Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill. 
Repeatedly charges at the enemy at high speed.
Unique_Yakushima_MouthTossin.descriptionZh:
克苏鲁之眼的专用技能。
以极高速度多次朝敌人发起冲锋。

Unique_Yakushima_SummonServant.name: Servant Call
Unique_Yakushima_SummonServant.description:
Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill. 
Summons four Servants that charge at enemies to deal damage. 
Servants disappear after taking damage or after a short time.
Unique_Yakushima_SummonServant.descriptionZh:
克苏鲁之眼的专用技能。
召唤4个仆从撞向敌人并造成伤害。仆从会在受到攻击或经过一定时间后消失。

Unique_Yeti_Grass_GrassBall.name: Lawn Bowling
Unique_Yeti_Grass_GrassBall.description:
Wumpo Botan's exclusive skill.
Rolls a ball made of grass as it moves forward, and when it grows large enough, 
it throws it to cause an explosion.
Unique_Yeti_Grass_GrassBall.descriptionZh:
绿苔绒怪的专用技能。
一边向前方突进一边滚动草球，
在草球滚的足够大时投掷出去，使其炸裂。

Unique_Yeti_SnowBall.name: Snow Bowling
Unique_Yeti_SnowBall.description:
Wumpo's exclusive skill.
Rolls a snowball as it moves forward, and when it grows large enough, 
it throws it to cause an explosion.
Unique_Yeti_SnowBall.descriptionZh:
白绒雪怪的专用技能。
一边向前方突进一边滚动雪球，
在雪球滚的足够大时投掷出去，使其炸裂。

WallSplash.name: Curtain Splash
WallSplash.description: Continously creates walls made from water columns at the enemy's location.
WallSplash.descriptionZh: 连续在敌人的脚下生成水柱结成的墙壁。

WaterBall.name: Aqua Burst
WaterBall.description:
Creates a giant ball of water
and hurls it at an enemy.
WaterBall.descriptionZh:
在头上生成巨大水球
瞄准敌人并发射。

WaterGun.name: Aqua Gun
WaterGun.description:
Hurls a ball of water
straight at an enemy.
WaterGun.descriptionZh:
发射水弹
笔直飞向对方。

Weapon_Use.name: Use Weapon
Weapon_Use.descriptionZh: 使用持有的武器进行攻击。

WindBurst.name: Wind Burst
WindBurst.description: Summons a massive wind vortex around itself and unleashes a powerful attack.
WindBurst.descriptionZh:
以自身为中心掀起巨大的风暴漩涡，
发动强力攻击。

WindCutter.name: Wind Cutter
WindCutter.description:
Fires a high speed blade of wind
that flies straight at an enemy.
WindCutter.descriptionZh:
发射超高速风刃
瞄准后笔直飞向敌人。

WindEdge.name: Wind Edge
WindEdge.description: Launches sharp blades of air that fan out.

Alien.name: Otherworldly Cells
Alien.description:
Attack +{EffectValue1}%
Fire damage reduction {EffectValue2}%
Lightning damage reduction {EffectValue3}%
